Luke14:30 mayasya, ‘Mũndũ ũũ ambĩlĩĩlye mwako na waemela katĩ!’" 
Luke14:31 “O ta ũu, nĩ mũsumbĩ wĩva ũtambaa kwĩkala nthĩ, asisye kana e na vinya mwĩanu wa kũthi kũkita na mũsumbĩ ũngĩ wĩ na asikalĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ, ethĩwa we e o na asikalĩ ngili ĩkũmi?" 
Luke14:32 Ethĩwa nde na vinya mwĩanu, nũtũmanaa kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ ũsu ũngĩ e o kũasa, athi akakũlw'e ũndũ matonya kwĩthĩwa na mũuo." 
Luke14:33 Kwoou vai ũmwe katĩ wenyu ũtonya kũtw'ĩka mũmanyĩw'a wakwa ethĩwa ndatia syĩndũ syake syonthe. 
Luke14:34 “Mũnyũ nĩ mũseo, ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩwaasya mũsamo, vai kĩndũ kĩtũngĩĩa mũsamo waw'o." 
Luke14:35 Ndwĩ vata kwĩkĩwa mũũndanĩ kana vũũnĩ, na kwoou nĩwĩkaw'a ĩtheka. Ũla wĩ kũtũ nĩew'e!”" 
Luke15:1 Ĩvinda yĩmwe aumĩthya aingĩ ma koti na andũ angĩ avĩtany'a nĩmookie kũmwĩthukĩĩsya Yesũ. 
Luke15:2 Avalisi na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmambĩĩie kũnyungunyĩsya mayasya atĩĩ, “Mũndũ ũũ athokasya avĩtany'a o na kũĩsanĩa namo!”" 
Luke15:3 Kwoou Yesũ amatavya ngelekany'o ĩno: 
Luke15:4 “Kwa sũanĩai, ũmwe wenyu e na malondu ĩana, na yĩmwe yĩyaa, ekaa ata? Nũtiaa ala mĩongo kenda na kenda o maendee kũya, na aithi kũmantha yĩu yau nginya ayone." 
Luke15:5 Ayona, nũyilĩĩlaa kĩtuo akayĩkua e na ũtanu." 
Luke15:6 Amina kũvika mũsyĩ, nĩwũmbanasya anyanyae na atũi akamea atĩĩ, ‘Tanai vamwe nakwa nũndũ nĩnonie ĩlondu yakwa yĩla yĩĩ yau.’" 
Luke15:7 O ta ũu ekai nĩmũtavye, kũkeethĩwa ũtanu mwingangĩ kũya ĩtunĩ, ĩũlũ wa mũvĩtany'a ũmwe eelila kwondũ wa naĩ syake, kũte ĩũlũ wa andũ mĩongo kenda na kenda aĩlu matena vata wa kwĩlila kwondũ wa naĩ syoo." 
Luke15:8 “O na sũanĩai, mũndũ mũka e na silingi ĩkũmi na ayasya ĩmwe, ekaa ata? Nũkwatasya taa na aituta nyũmba amanthĩte silingi ĩsu nginya amyone." 
Luke15:9 Amina kũmyona, nĩwũmbanasya anyanyae make na atũi akamea atĩĩ, ‘Tanai vamwe nakwa nũndũ nĩnonie silingi yakwa ĩla yĩĩ mbau!’" 
Luke15:10 O ta ũu ekai nĩmũtavye, alaĩka ma Ngai nĩmatanaa nũndũ wa mũvĩtany'a ũmwe eelila kwondũ wa naĩ syake.”" 
Luke15:11 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kũtavya andũ amea atĩĩ, “Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe waĩ na ana elĩ." 
Luke15:12 Ĩlumaita nĩyeeie ĩthe atĩĩ, ‘Nau, nenge ũtiĩwa ũla wakwa.’ Kwoou amaaany'a ũthwii wake." 
Luke15:13 Ĩtina wa matukũ mavũthũ, ĩlumaita yĩu nĩyathooisye syĩndũ syayo syonthe, na yauma mũsyĩ yathi nthĩ ĩngĩ yĩ kũasa. Nĩyaanangĩe mbesa syayo mĩkalonĩ ĩte myaĩlu." 
Luke15:14 Yamina kũtũmĩa mbesa syayo syonthe, nthĩ ĩsu nĩyeethĩiwe na yũa ĩnene, na ĩlumaita yĩu yambĩĩa kũthĩna." 
Luke15:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ yaendie kũthũkũma kwa mũndũ ũmwe wa nthĩ ĩsu, nake ayĩtwaa kyengonĩ yĩkaĩthasye ngũlũe syake." 
Luke15:16 Nĩyendaa mũno kũya lĩu ũla ngũlũe syaĩsaa, ĩndĩ vai mũndũ waayĩnenga kĩndũ." 
Luke15:17 Mũthya nĩyesie kũsũanĩa yasya, ‘Mbona ĩthe wakwa e athũkũmi aingĩ na onthe nĩmaĩsaa lĩu na makatialya, nakwa ninyie ũũ ngũkw'ĩĩa kũũ nĩ nzaa!" 
Luke15:18 Nĩngũkĩla nĩsyoke kwa ĩthe wakwa na ngĩmwĩa: Nau, nyie nĩnĩvĩtĩtye kwa Ngai na ngaũvĩtĩsya." 
Luke15:19 O na ndyaĩlĩtwe nĩ kwĩtwa mwana waku ĩngĩ; mbose o ta ũmwe wa athũkũmi maku.’ 
Luke15:20 Kwoou nĩyookĩlile na yambĩĩa kyalo kya kũsyoka kwa ĩthe. “Yĩtanamba kũvika mũsyĩ yĩ o kũasa, ĩthe wayo nĩwayonie, na ausũĩtwe nĩ tei asemba athi ayĩkumbatĩlya na ayĩkethya na ngethi ya wendo." 
Luke15:21 Ĩlumaita yĩu nĩyamwĩie ĩthe atĩĩ, ‘Nyie nĩnĩvĩtĩtye kwa Ngai na ngaũvĩtĩsya; ndyaĩlĩtwe nĩ kwĩtwa mwana waku ĩngĩ!’" 
Luke15:22 Ĩndĩ ĩthe eeta athũkũmi make amea atĩĩ, ‘Sembai mũete ngũa ĩla nzeo vyũ mũmwĩkĩe. O ta ũu mwĩkĩei mbete kyaa, na mũimwĩkĩa iatũ." 
Luke15:23 Mwamina ũu, endai mwose kasalũ kala kanou mũae, na mũiseũvya mboka tũtane." 
Luke15:24 Nĩkwĩthĩwa mwana ũũ wakwa anaĩ mũkw'ũ na nĩwasyũka, anaĩ mwau ĩndĩ nĩwooneka.’ Na kwoou mboka yambĩĩa." 
Luke15:25 “Ĩvindanĩ yĩu mwana ũla mũkũũ aĩ naku mũũndanĩ. Asyokete e vakuvĩ na mũsyĩ, nĩweewie andũ mayina na kũsũnga." 
Luke15:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weetie mũthũkũmi ũmwe amũkũlya atĩĩ, ‘Nĩ kyaũ kĩendee kũu mũsyĩ?’" 
Luke15:27 Nake amũsũngĩa, ‘Mũinau nĩwũkie, na ĩthe waku amũaĩa kala kasalũ kanou, nũndũ nĩwamwona e mũima.’" 
Luke15:28 “Mwana ũsu mũkũũ nĩwathatie mũno na alea kũlika mũsyĩ. Ĩthe wake nĩwookie amwĩsũva mathi mũsyĩ. 
Luke15:29 Ĩndĩ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Kwa sisya, myaka ĩno yonthe ndwĩe ngũthũkũmaa ta nĩ ngombo, na vai ũndũ o na ũmwe waku naalea kwĩka, ĩndĩ ndwaambũaĩa o na katena ka mbũi, ngatana vamwe na anyanyawa!" 
Luke15:30 Ĩndĩ yĩla mwana ũũ waku wũkie, ũla waanangie mbesa syaku na malwaya, we ũmũaĩie kasalũ kala kanou!’" 
Luke15:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nake ĩthe wamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Mwana wakwa wĩthĩawa nakwa kĩla ĩvinda, na syĩndũ ii nĩ nasyo syonthe no syaku." 
Luke15:32 Ĩndĩ tũyĩĩ tũlea kũtana nũndũ mũinau anaĩ mũkw'ũ na nĩwasyũka, anaĩ mwau na nĩwooneka.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Yesũ nĩwatavisye amanyĩw'a make amea atĩĩ, “Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe mũthwii waĩ na mũthũkũmi wa kũũngamĩa syĩndũ syake. Mũthwii ũsu nĩwataviw'e kana mũũngamĩi wa syĩndũ syake aendee na kũsyananga." 
Luke16:2 Nĩwamwĩtie mũũngamĩi ũsu amũkũlya atĩĩ, ‘Nĩ maũndũ maũ aa ngwĩw'a ĩũlũ waku? Enda ũndetee ũtalo wa syĩndũ syakwa, nũndũ kuma yu ndũtonya kũendeea kwĩthĩwa mũũngamĩi wa syĩndũ syakwa.’" 
Luke16:3 Mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwambĩĩie kwĩkũlya, ‘Nĩĩka ata na mũnene wakwa nũkũmbumya wĩanĩ? Ndi na vinya wa kũsimba, na nditonya kũthi ngĩvoya andũ syĩndũ." 
Luke16:4 Aa, nĩnamanya ũndũ ngwĩka nĩ kana navutwa vaa andũ methĩawe matonya kũnthokya kwoo.’" 
Luke16:5 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ woombanisye andũ onthe ala maĩ na thiĩ na mũnene wake. Nĩweetie wa mbee amũkũlya atĩĩ, ‘We ũtaĩtwe kyaũ nĩ mũnene wakwa?’" 
Luke16:6 Nake amwĩa, ‘Mĩtũngi ĩana ya mauta.’ Mũũngamĩi amwĩa, ‘Osa valũa wa thiĩ waku, na ũyĩkala nthĩ mĩtũkĩ ũandĩke mĩtũngi mĩongo ĩtano.’" 
Luke16:7 Nĩwasyokie akũlya ũngĩ, ‘Naku ũtaĩtwe kyaũ?’ Ũsu amũsũngĩa amwĩa, ‘Makunia ĩana ma nganũ.’ Nake amwĩa, ‘Osa valũa wa thiĩ waku, ũandĩke makunia mĩongo nyanya.’ ”" 
Luke16:8 “Mũnene wa mũthũkũmi ũsu ũtaĩkĩĩwa nĩwamũkathie mũno kwondũ wa kũtũmĩa mawũĩ, nũndũ andũ ma nthĩ ĩno matũmĩaa mawũĩ maingĩ yĩla mekwĩka maũndũ moo kũte andũ ma kyeni.”" 
Luke16:9 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kũmea atĩĩ, “Kwoou ekai nĩmũtavye, tumai ndũũ na andũ kwa kũtũmĩa ũthwii wa nthĩ ĩno, nĩ kana yĩla wĩthela mwĩthokw'a mũsyĩnĩ wa tene na tene." 
Luke16:10 Mũndũ ũla ũĩkĩĩkaa maũndũnĩ manini nĩ ũĩkĩĩkaa maũndũnĩ manene o namo; ĩndĩ ũla ũtaĩkĩĩka maũndũnĩ manini, o na maũndũnĩ manene ndaĩkĩĩka." 
Luke16:11 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ mũtwĩe mũtaĩkĩĩka na ũthwii wa kũũ nthĩ, nũũ ũla wĩmũĩkĩĩa maũndũnĩ ma ũthwii ũla wa w'o?" 
Luke16:12 Na ethĩwa mwĩthĩĩtwe mũtaĩkĩĩka syĩndũnĩ syeene, nũũ ũla wĩmũnenga syenyu?" 
Luke16:13 “Vai mũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũthũkũmi wa anene elĩ, nũndũ akamwenda ũmwe na aimena ũla ũngĩ, kana amwĩw'e ũmwe na aivũthya ũla ũngĩ. Kwoou mũitonya kũthũkũma Ngai mũkwatanĩsye na ũthwii.”" 
Luke16:14 Yĩla Avalisi meewie maũndũ asu, nĩmamũvũthisye Yesũ, nũndũ mo mendete mbesa mũno." 
Luke16:15 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Ninyw'ĩ andũ ala meseũvasya methonĩ ma andũ, ĩndĩ Ngai nĩwĩsĩ kĩla kĩ ngoonĩ syenyu, nũndũ syĩndũ ila andũ monaa syĩ nzeo mũno, kwa Ngai nĩsyo sya mana vyũ." 
Luke16:16 “Mĩao ya Mwose na mawathani nĩsyathelile na ĩvinda ya Yoana Mũvatisi. Kuma ĩvinda yĩu Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩthĩawa ũitavanw'a, na kĩla mũndũ nĩwĩvinyĩlĩĩlasya alike." 
Luke16:17 Ĩndĩ nĩ laisangi kwa ĩtu na nthĩ kũthela, kũte kũvetwa kwa kateto o na kamwe ka Mĩao." 
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ o na wĩva amũlea mũka na kũtwaa mũndũ mũka ũngĩ, ethĩawa akĩlaalaa. O ta ũu mũndũ atwaa mũndũ mũka mũlee nĩ mũũme ethĩawa akĩlaalaa." 
Luke16:19 “Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe mũthwii, weekĩaa ngũa sya thooa mũnene mũno na weethĩawa na motanu maingĩ kĩla mũthenya." 
Luke16:20 Mũvĩanĩ kwake nĩvakomaw'a mũndũ ngya, weetawa Lasalo, waĩ na itau mwĩĩ w'onthe," 
Luke16:21 na wendaa anengawe lĩu ũla wavalũkanga kuma mesanĩ ya mũthwii ũsu. O na ngitĩ nĩsyookaa na kũnyenyanga itau syake. 
Luke16:22 “Mũndũ ũsu ngya nĩwesie kũkw'a na ooswa nĩ alaĩka atwawa ekalw'a vakuvĩ na Avalaamu ĩtunĩ. Ũla mũndũ mũthwii o nake nĩwakwie na athikwa. 
Luke16:23 E vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa, aendee na kũthĩna mũno, nĩwookĩlilye metho oona Avalaamu e naku kũndũ kũasa na Lasalo ailyĩ vakuvĩ nake." 
Luke16:24 Nĩweetanie mũno: ‘Nau Avalaamu! Mbĩw'ĩe tei, na ũitũma Lasalo ainde kyaa kĩw'ũnĩ na ayũka anthithye ũĩmĩ, nũndũ nĩngũthĩnĩa mũno vaa mwakinĩ ũũ.’" 
Luke16:25 “Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Mwana, lilikana kana we yĩla waĩ thayũ nĩwakwatie syĩndũ ila nzeo, nake Lasalo akwata syĩndũ ila nthũku, ĩndĩ yu Lasalo etanĩa kũũ naku ũendee na kũthĩna." 
Luke16:26 Ũu wĩ o vo, ve ĩtw'ĩku ĩnene mũno katĩ waitũ nenyu, ũkethĩa andũ ala me kũũ maitonya kũinga makoka kũu, na ala me kũu mayĩinga makoka kũũ.’" 
Luke16:27 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Nĩngũkwĩsũva ĩndĩ nau Avalaamu ũtũme Lasalo athi nyũmbanĩ ya nau," 
Luke16:28 akakany'e ana-a-ia makwa me atano, nĩ kana o namo maikaaũke kũndũ kũũ kũthĩnĩaa andũ ũu.’" 
Luke16:29 “Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Ana-a-au me na Maandĩko ma Mwose na ma athani; methukĩĩsye asu.’" 
Luke16:30 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa, ‘Aiee, nau Avalaamu! Mũndũ akathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ na aithi kũu maĩ, no melile kwondũ wa naĩ syoo.’" 
Luke16:31 Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa, ‘Makalea kwĩthukĩĩsya Maandĩko ma Mwose na ma athani, mayĩtĩkĩla o na mũndũ akathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Yesũ nĩwasyokie atavya amanyĩw'a make amea atĩĩ, “Matatwa mailea kũka mũndũnĩ, ĩndĩ kyeva nĩ kwa mũndũ ũla ũtumaa moka." 
Luke17:2 Nĩ kavaa mũndũ ũsu akoveewa ĩvia ĩnene ngingo na kwĩkw'a ũkanganĩ, kwĩ kũtuma ũmwe wa aa anini eka naĩ!" 
Luke17:3 Kwoou ĩsũvĩei mũno maũndũnĩ ala mũkwĩka! “Ethĩwa mwana-a-au nĩwakũvĩtĩsya mũkany'e, na akwĩtya ũekeo mũekee." 
Luke17:4 O na ethĩwa akũvĩtĩsya mavinda mũonza kwa mũthenya na kĩla ĩvinda ayũka aikw'ĩa, ‘Nĩngũvĩtĩsye, ndekee,’ no nginya ũmũekee.”" 
Luke17:5 Atũmwa nĩmeeie Mwĩai atĩĩ, “Twongeleele mũĩkĩĩo!”" 
Luke17:6 Nake Mwĩai amea atĩĩ, “Kethĩwa mwĩ na mũĩkĩĩo wĩana o mbeke ĩla nini ya mũtĩ nĩkwĩa mũkũyũ ũũ, ‘Kũka vau ũkevande ũkanganĩ,’ na ũyĩka ũu mwasya." 
Luke17:7 “Nũũ katĩ wenyu mũthũkũmi wake ekũĩmaa kana ekũĩthasya malondu asyoka mũsyĩ aumĩte wĩanĩ ũmwĩa, ‘Ĩkalaate wĩkale nthĩ ũathĩw'e?’" 
Luke17:8 Vandũ va ũu amwĩaa atĩĩ, ‘Enda ũnzeũvĩsye lĩu wa wĩoo, na ũyĩyova kĩkoi wũke ũnthũkũme nambe kũathĩw'a. We nũkwĩsa kũya ĩtina.’" 
Luke17:9 Mũthũkũmi ũsu ndatũngĩawa mũvea nũndũ wa kwĩanĩsya ũndũ weewa eke. 
Luke17:10 Kwoou o nenyu, yĩla mweanĩsya kĩla mwĩĩtwe mwĩke aasyai, ‘Ithyĩ twĩ o athũkũmi, na tweeka kũtethya o wĩa ũla witũ.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Yesũ o aendete Yelũsalemu, nĩwesĩlile mũvakanĩ wa Samalia na Kalilii." 
Luke17:12 Aendete akalike ndũanĩ ĩmwe, nĩwakomanie na aũme ĩkũmi mawaĩte mangũ. Nĩmaũngamie vaasa," 
Luke17:13 na meetana na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ, “Yesũ! Mũmanyĩsya, twĩw'ĩe tei!”" 
Luke17:14 Yĩla Yesũ wamonie nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Endai mũkeyonany'e kwa athembi maĩkĩĩthye kana mwĩ avou.” Me nzĩanĩ maendete nĩmavoiw'e." 
Luke17:15 Yĩla ũmwe woo woonie kana nĩwavow'a, nĩwasyokie aimũkatha Ngai na wasya mũnene." 
Luke17:16 Nĩwakomie nthĩ na ĩvu vakuvĩ na Yesũ na amũtũngĩa mũvea; mũndũ ũsu aĩ Mũsamalia. 
Luke17:17 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ, “Andũ ala mavow'a ti ĩkũmi? Ala angĩ kenda maĩva?" 
Luke17:18 Mbona mũeni ũũ e weka nowe wasyoka amũtũngĩe Ngai mũvea?” 
Luke17:19 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ũkĩla ũthi, nĩwavow'a nũndũ wa mũĩkĩĩo waku.”" 
Luke17:20 Avalisi amwe nĩmamũkũlilye Yesũ yĩla ũsumbĩ wa Ngai ũkoka. Nake amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ, “Ũsumbĩ wa Ngai ti kĩndũ kya kwoneka kyũkĩte." 
Luke17:21 Vai mũndũ ũkethĩwa atonya kwasya, ‘Kwa sisyai nĩ ũũ vaa,’ kana, ‘Nĩ ũya vaya,’ nũndũ ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩ katĩ wenyu.”" 
Luke17:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ, “Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla mũkenda kwona ũmwe wa mĩthenya ya Mwana wa Mũndũ, ĩndĩ mũikawona." 
Luke17:23 Ve andũ makokĩla mamwĩe, ‘Sisyai e vaya,’ kana ‘Sisyai e vaa!’ Mũikaamaatĩĩe." 
Luke17:24 Mwana wa Mũndũ akaumĩla ta ũtisi, ũla ũtisaa ũkathesya ĩtu yonthe." 
Luke17:25 Ĩndĩ mbee wa ũu, akamba kũthĩnw'a mũno na kũlewa nĩ andũ ma ĩvinda yĩĩ." 
Luke17:26 O ũndũ kwailyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Noa, now'o kwĩĩthĩwa kũilyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Mwana wa Mũndũ." 
Luke17:27 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu, andũ nĩmaĩsaa na kũnyw'a, na nĩmatwaanaa na kũtwawa, kũvika mũthenya ũla Noa walikile ngalawanĩ, na kwooka kĩla kĩw'ũ kingĩ kyamoaa." 
Luke17:28 Yĩkeethĩwa yĩilyĩ ũndũ kwailyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Loto. Andũ nĩmaĩsaa na kũnyw'a, na nĩmathooaa syĩndũ na kũthoosya, na nĩmavandaa na kwaka myako." 
Luke17:29 Ĩndĩ mũthenya ũla Loto waumie Sondomu, mwaki wa lavuti nĩwatheeie kuma ĩtunĩ wamavĩvya andũ onthe makw'a." 
Luke17:30 Ũu now'o kwĩĩthĩwa kũilyĩ mũthenya ũla Mwana wa Mũndũ wĩumĩla. 
Luke17:31 “Mũthenyanĩ ũsu, mũndũ ũla ũkethĩwa nyũmbanĩ yake ĩũlũ, ndakaatinde aitheea ose mĩio kuma nyũmbanĩ yake, na o ta ũu, ũla ũkethĩwa mũũndanĩ ndakaatinde aisyoka mũsyĩ." 
Luke17:32 Lilikanai kĩla kyeekĩkie kwa mũka wa Loto! 
Luke17:33 Mũndũ ũla wendaa kũsũvĩa thayũ wake akawasya; ĩndĩ ũla waasya thayũ wake akawona ĩngĩ. 
Luke17:34 Ekai nĩmũtavye, ũtukũ ũsu andũ elĩ nĩmakethĩwa makomete kĩtandanĩ kĩmwe; ũmwe nũkoswa, na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa." 
Luke17:35 Aka elĩ nĩmakethĩwa maithiĩa ĩvianĩ yĩmwe; ũmwe nũkoswa na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa.” [ 
Luke17:36 O ta ũu, aũme elĩ makeethĩwa mũũndanĩ; ũmwe nũkoswa na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa.]" 
Luke17:37 Amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Mwĩai ũndũ ũũ ũkeethĩwa va?” Nake Yesũ amasũngĩa, “Vandũ vala ve kimba nĩvo ndei syũmbanĩlĩĩlaa.”" 
Luke18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watavisye amanyĩw'a make ngelekany'o ayenda kũmamanyĩsya kana nĩmaĩlĩte kũvoyaa kĩla ĩvinda mate kũkw'a ngoo. 
Luke18:2 Nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Ndũanĩ ĩmwe vaĩ mũsili wa makoani wekalaa vo, ũtamũkĩaa Ngai kana akanenga mũndũ o na wĩva ndaĩa." 
Luke18:3 O ta ũu, ndũanĩ ĩsu vaĩ kĩveti ndiwa kyatindĩaa kũthi kwa mũsili ũsu wa makoani, na kũmwĩsũva akĩtetee kĩikavalũkw'e nĩ ũla masikatanĩte." 
Luke18:4 Mũsili ũsu nĩwatatie kũlea vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa, ĩndĩ mũthya esa kũsũanĩa e weka asya, ‘O na kau ndimũkĩaa Ngai kana kũnenga mũndũ o na wĩva ndaĩa," 
Luke18:5 ĩndĩ nũndũ nĩtindĩa kũthĩnw'a nĩ kĩveti kĩĩ, nĩngũkĩtetea, nũndũ nalea, kĩendeea kũkaa na kũndya mũtwe!’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai wameie atĩĩ, “Kwa ĩw'ai ũndũ mũndũ ũsu ũte mũlũngalu waneena." 
Luke18:7 Nĩkũlya, o nake Ngai ndakatetea andũ make ala mamũĩĩaa ũtukũ na mũthenya? Akatindanga ateũmethukĩĩsya?" 
Luke18:8 Ekai nĩmũtavye, akamatetea mĩtũkĩ mũno. Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo, nĩkũlya, Mwana wa Mũndũ akeethĩa mũndũ wĩ na mũĩkĩĩo yĩla wĩũka kũũ nthĩ?”" 
Luke18:9 Yesũ nĩwasyokie atavya andũ ala monaa me alũngalu kwĩ andũ ala angĩ ngelekany'o ĩno: 
Luke18:10 “Andũ elĩ nĩmaendie Ĩkalũnĩ kũvoya; ũmwe aĩ Mũvalisi na ũla ũngĩ aĩ mumĩthya wa koti. 
Luke18:11 “Mũvalisi nĩwaũngamie vandũ vake e weka na avoya ayasya, ‘Ngai, nĩngũũtũngĩa mũvea nĩkwĩthĩwa nyie ndi mũvenani, ndi mũkengani, na ndi kĩlaalai ta andũ ala angĩ, o na ndiilyĩ ta mumĩthya ũũ wa koti." 
Luke18:12 Nĩndĩĩaa kũya kelĩ kwa kyumwa, na nĩnumasya kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya syĩndũ syonthe ila ngwataa.’" 
Luke18:13 “Mumĩthya wa koti nake nĩwaũngamie kũasa, na o na ndaang'elela ĩtunĩ, ĩndĩ eekwata kĩthũi na asya, ‘Ame Ngai, mbĩw'ĩe tei, nyie nĩ mũvĩtany'a!’" 
Luke18:14 Ekai nĩmũtavye, mumĩthya ũsu wa koti nĩwe wenũkie atalĩlwe kwĩthĩwa mũlũngalu, na ti Mũvalisi ũsu, nũndũ mũndũ ũla wĩnenevasya akanyivw'a, nake ũla wĩnyivasya akanenevw'a.”" 
Luke18:15 Andũ amwe nĩmaeteie Yesũ syana nini aiathime kwa kũsilĩĩla moko, ĩndĩ yĩla amanyĩw'a mamonie mamasiĩĩa kwĩka ũu." 
Luke18:16 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asyĩta ithi vala ũĩ ayasya atĩĩ, “Ekanai na syana nini syũke vala nĩĩ, mũikaisiĩĩe, nũndũ Ũsumbĩ wa Ngai nĩ wa ala mailyĩ tasyo." 
Luke18:17 Nĩmũtavya w'o, mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũtosaa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai o tondũ kana kanini katonya kũwosa, ndakalika vo.”" 
Luke18:18 Mũtongoi ũmwe wa Ayuti nĩwamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya mũseo, naĩlĩte kwĩka ata nĩ kana nĩkwate thayũ ũtathela?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Wĩmbĩta mũseo nĩkĩ? Vai mũndũ mũseo; no Ngai mũseo e weka." 
Luke18:20 We nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ mĩao ĩkwasya: ‘Ndũkalaalae; ndũkoae mũndũ; ndũkoye; ndũkanengane ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa mũndũ ũngĩ; nenga ĩthe waku na inyia waku ndaĩa.’ ” 
Luke18:21 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ, “Nyie nambĩĩie kũkwata mĩao ĩsu yonthe kuma nĩ mũnini.”" 
Luke18:22 Yesũ eew'a ũu amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ve ũndũ ũmwe ũtialĩtye naw'o nĩ ũũ: Enda ũkathoosye syĩndũ syaku syonthe, na ũinenga ngya mbesa ila ũũkwata, naku ũkeethĩwa na ũthwii ĩtunĩ na ĩndĩ ũyũka ũngaatĩĩe.”" 
Luke18:23 Mũndũ ũsu eew'a ndeto isu, nĩweewie woo mwingĩ nũndũ aĩ mũthwii mũno." 
Luke18:24 Yesũ nĩwasyaisye mũndũ ũsu na asya atĩĩ, “Ũkeethĩwa wĩ ũndũ wĩ vinya kwa andũ athwii kũlika ũsumbĩnĩ wa Ngai!" 
Luke18:25 Ĩĩ, ũkeethĩwa wĩ laisi kwa ngamĩle kũlikĩla kalimanĩ ka singano, kũte mũndũ mũthwii kũlika ũsumbĩnĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Luke18:26 Andũ ala meewie ũu nĩmakũlilye atĩĩ, “Na yu nũũ ũla ũtonya kũkwata thayũ ũtathela?”" 
Luke18:27 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Kĩla kĩtatonyeka kwa andũ, nĩkĩtonyeka kwa Ngai.”" 
Luke18:28 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ithyĩ nĩtũtiĩte mĩsyĩ yaitũ tũkakũatĩĩa.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Nĩmũtavya w'o, mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũtiĩte mũsyĩ, kana mũka, kana ana-a-inyia, kana asyai, kana syana kwondũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai," 
Luke18:30 akakwata syĩndũ mbingĩ mũno ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ, na aikwata thayũ ũtathela ĩvindanĩ yĩla yũkĩte.”" 
Luke18:31 Yesũ nĩweetie ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ mathi nzama ũtee na amea atĩĩ, “Ĩthukĩĩsyei, yu tũendete Yelũsalemu, na maũndũ onthe ala maandĩkĩtwe nĩ athani ĩũlũ wa Mwana wa Mũndũ nĩmeũthi kwĩanĩw'a kũu." 
Luke18:32 Nũkũthi kũnenganwe kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ, namo makamũthekeea na kũmũumanga o vamwe na kũmũtw'ĩlanga mata." 
Luke18:33 O ta ũu makamũvũa na kũmũaa, ĩndĩ akathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ.”" 
Luke18:34 Kĩla Yesũ wawetaa kyaĩ kĩvithany'e kwoo, na kwoou mayaamanya aneenaa ĩũlũ wa kyaũ." 
Luke18:35 Yesũ e vakuvĩ kũvika Yeliko, nĩweethĩie mũndũ ũmwe kĩlalinda ailyĩ nthĩ ũtee wa nzĩa akĩvoya andũ syĩndũ." 
Luke18:36 Yĩla weewie andũ aingĩ mavĩtĩte, nĩwakũlilye nĩ kyaũ kĩla kĩendee." 
Luke18:37 Andũ nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Nĩ Yesũ kuma Nasaleti ũvĩtĩte.”" 
Luke18:38 Mũndũ ũsu nĩweetanie mũno ayasya atĩĩ, “Yesũ mwana wa Ndeviti, mbĩw'ĩe tei!”" 
Luke18:39 Andũ ala maĩ mbee nĩmamũkanisye avindye, ĩndĩ eetana na wasya mũnene mbeange, “Mwana wa Ndeviti, mbĩw'ĩe tei!”" 
Luke18:40 Yesũ nĩwaũngamie na asya mũndũ ũsu nĩaetwe vala ũĩ. Athengeea vakuvĩ, Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ," 
Luke18:41 “Wĩenda ngwĩke ata?” Nake amwĩa atĩĩ, “Mwĩai, nĩenda ũndonyethye kwona nthĩ.”" 
Luke18:42 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ambĩĩa kwona; nĩwavow'a nũndũ wa mũĩkĩĩo waku.”" 
Luke18:43 Vau kwa vau nĩwambĩĩie kwona nthĩ, na auma Yesũ ĩtina aimũkumya Ngai. Yĩla andũ onthe moonie ũu, o namo nĩmamũkathie Ngai." 
Luke19:1 Yesũ nĩwalikile ndũanĩ ya Yeliko ĩndĩ o avĩtĩte. 
Luke19:2 Vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe ndũanĩ ĩsu weetawa Sakayo waĩ mumĩthya mũnene wa koti na waĩ mũthwii mũno. 
Luke19:3 Nĩwendaa kwona Yesũ amanye nĩwe ũũ, ĩndĩ ndaatonya kũmwona nũndũ wa wingĩ wa andũ, na kwongela aĩ mũkuvĩ mũno." 
Luke19:4 Kwoou nĩwasembie aendaa mbee na alĩsa mũkũyũnĩ nĩ kana atonye kũmwona Yesũ, nũndũ aĩ esĩle nzĩanĩ ĩsu." 
Luke19:5 Yĩla Yesũ wavikie vau, nĩwasyaisye ĩũlũ na amwĩa atĩĩ, “Sakayo, Uma mĩtũkĩ; ũmũnthĩ no nginya ndinde mũsyĩ kwaku.”" 
Luke19:6 Sakayo nĩwaumie mũtĩnĩ mĩtũkĩ, athi amũthokya Yesũ e na ũtanu mwingĩ." 
Luke19:7 Yĩla andũ onthe moonie ũu, nĩmanyungunyĩisye mayasya atĩĩ, “Mũndũ ũũ athi kwĩthĩwa mũeni wa mũndũ mũvĩtany'a!”" 
Luke19:8 Ĩndĩ Sakayo nĩwaũngamie na eea Mwĩai atĩĩ, “Ĩthukĩĩsye Mwĩai, nyie nĩngũnenga ngya nyusu ya ũthwii wakwa, na ethĩwa ve mũndũ naavena kĩndũ, nĩngũmũtũngĩa mavinda ana ma kĩndũ kĩu.”" 
Luke19:9 Yesũ nĩwaisye atĩĩ, “Ũmũnthĩ ũtangĩĩo nĩwalika mũsyĩnĩ ũũ, nũndũ mũndũ ũũ o nake nĩ nzyawa ya Avalaamu." 
Luke19:10 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Mwana wa Mũndũ ookie kũmantha na kũtangĩĩa andũ ala au.” 
Luke19:11 Andũ o maendee na kwĩthukĩĩsya maũndũ asu, Yesũ nĩwamatavisye ngelekany'o. Aĩ vakuvĩ kũvika Yelũsalemu na andũ masũanĩaa kana ũsumbĩ wa Ngai nũkwambĩĩa o mĩtũkĩ." 
Luke19:12 Nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wa nyũmba ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ waendaa kyalo nthĩ yĩ kũasa, akatw'ĩkĩthw'e mũsumbĩ na aisyoka." 
Luke19:13 Atanamba kũthi, nĩweetie athũkũmi make ĩkũmi amanenga kĩla ũmwe mbesa sya thaavu na amea atĩĩ, ‘Tandĩthyai mbesa ii kũvika yĩla nĩũka.’" 
Luke19:14 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwamenetwe nĩ andũ, na kwoou matũma andũ mamume ĩtina mathi makasye, ‘Tũikwenda mũndũ ũũ atw'ĩke mũsumbĩ waitũ.’" 
Luke19:15 “Yĩla wasyokie mũsyĩ amina kũtw'ĩkĩthw'a mũsumbĩ, nĩwatũmanie ala athũkũmi moke, nĩ kana amanye ũndũ matandĩthĩtye mbesa syake." 
Luke19:16 “Ũla wa mbee nĩwookie na amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Mũnene, mbesa syaku nĩnĩnaitandĩthisye nakwata ingĩ ĩkũmi.’" 
Luke19:17 Nake amwĩa, ‘Wĩkĩte nesa; we wĩ mũthũkũmi mũseo! Nũndũ ũneethĩiwe wĩ wa kwĩkwatw'a ũndũnĩ mũnini, nĩkũnenga kũũngamĩa ndũa ĩkũmi.’" 
Luke19:18 Wa kelĩ nake nĩwookie na amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Mũnene, mbesa syaku nĩnaitandĩthisye nakwata ingĩ itano.’" 
Luke19:19 Nĩwamwĩie ũsu nake, ‘Naku nĩkũnenga kũũngamĩa ndũa itano.’" 
Luke19:20 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi ũngĩ wookie amwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Mũnene, mbesa syaku nii vaa; nasyoveeie kĩtambaanĩ naivitha vo." 
Luke19:21 Nyie nĩnĩnaũkĩaa nũndũ we wĩ mũndũ mũmũ mũno; wosaa syĩndũ ite syaku na ũkethaa kĩla ũtaavanda.’ 
Luke19:22 Mũnene ũsu amwĩa, ‘Nĩkũsilĩla o na ndeto syaku we mũthũkũmi ũũ. Nĩwĩsĩ nĩ mũndũ mũmũ mũno na nosaa syĩndũ ite syakwa, na kũkethaa kĩla ndaavanda!" 
Luke19:23 Waleaa ĩndĩ kũtwaa mbesa syakwa vengi nĩkĩ, na nasyoka nĩthĩwa nĩnasyosie syĩ na ũsyao?’" 
Luke19:24 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie ala maũngyĩ nake vau atĩĩ, ‘Mũvenei mbesa isu mũnenge ũla mũthũkũmi wĩ na ĩkũmi.’" 
Luke19:25 Ĩndĩ andũ asu mamwĩa, ‘Mũnene, mbona ũsu e na ĩkũmi!’" 
Luke19:26 Nake amasũngĩa amea, ‘Ekai nĩmũtavye, mũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ akongeleelwa ingĩ mbingĩ, ĩndĩ ũla ũte na kĩndũ o na kala kanini wĩthĩwa e nako akavenwa." 
Luke19:27 Yu ĩndĩ ala amaitha makwa matendaa ngĩtw'ĩka mũsumbĩ woo, maetei vaa mũmoaĩe mbee wakwa!’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Yesũ amina kũneena ndeto isu, nĩwatongoeisye andũ elekele Yelũsalemu." 
Luke19:29 Yĩla wathengeeie ndũa yĩtawa Mbethivake na ĩngĩ yĩtawa Mbethani, vakuvĩ na Kĩĩma kya Mĩthata, nĩwatũmie amanyĩw'a make elĩ," 
Luke19:30 amea atĩĩ, “Endai ndũanĩ ĩya yĩ mbee wenyu, na mũilika nĩmũkwona ndena ya ĩng'oi ĩtaakua mũndũ yĩ mbove. Mĩthasyei na mũimĩete vaa." 
Luke19:31 Mwakũlw'a nĩ mũndũ, ‘Mwĩmĩthasya yakĩ?’ Mũtavyei, ‘Mwĩai e na vata nayo.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Kwoou nĩmaendie na mamyona o ũndũ wamatavĩtye. 
Luke19:33 Maendee na kũthasya ndena ĩsu, ene mayo nĩmamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Mwĩmĩthasya yakĩ?”" 
Luke19:34 Namo masũngĩa masya, “Mwĩai e na vata nayo.”" 
Luke19:35 Nĩmatwaĩie Yesũ ndena ĩsu. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mailĩĩile ngũa syoo mũongo kwayo, na mamũtetheesya kũtũla ĩũlũ." 
Luke19:36 Yesũ aendete akuĩtwe nĩ ndena ĩsu, andũ nĩmalanilye ngũa syoo kũu nzĩanĩ." 
Luke19:37 Athengee mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu e kĩtheeonĩ kya Kĩĩma kya Mĩthata, ĩkomano yonthe ya amanyĩw'a make nĩyambĩĩie kũtũngĩa Ngai mũvea, na kũmũkatha nũndũ wa maũndũ manene onthe ala moonete." 
Luke19:38 Nĩmaasya atĩĩ, “Nĩ mũathime mũsumbĩ ũla wũkĩte ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Mwĩai! Mũuo wĩthĩwe ĩtunĩ, na ũkumyo kwa Ngai ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ!”" 
Luke19:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi amwe maĩ ĩkomanonĩ yĩu mamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, kany'a amanyĩw'a aa maku mavindye.”" 
Luke19:40 Nake Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ, “Aa makavindya, mavia nĩkũneena na wasya mũnene.”" 
Luke19:41 Yĩla Yesũ wathengeeie mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu na awona, nĩwaĩie nũndũ waw'o" 
Luke19:42 ayasya atĩĩ, “Kethĩwa ũmũnthĩ nũmanya kĩla kĩtonya ũkũetee mũuo! Ĩndĩ nĩ kĩvithe ndũkyona." 
Luke19:43 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla amaitha maku makomba ivumbu ikũthyũlũlũkĩte. Makakũthyũlũlũka na maikũvinganĩsya kuma ngalĩko syonthe. 
Luke19:44 Makakwananga vyũ vamwe na andũ ala matũaa nthĩnĩ waku. Vai ĩvia makatia mataomboete. Makeeka ũu nũndũ ndwaaenda kũmanya ĩvinda yĩla Ngai wookie akwovosye.” 
Luke19:45 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie alika Ĩkalũnĩ, na ambĩĩa kũlũngya andũ ala mathooeasya syĩndũ vo" 
Luke19:46 akĩmea atĩĩ, “Maandĩko Matheu maĩtye, ‘Nyũmba yakwa nĩ nyũmba ya kũvoyea,’ nayu kwa sisyai, mũmĩtw'ĩkĩthĩtye vandũ va kwĩvithaa avutani.”" 
Luke19:47 Yesũ nĩwamanyĩasya Ĩkalũnĩ kĩla mũthenya. Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na atongoi ma andũ nĩmamanthaa ũndũ matonya kũmũaa," 
Luke19:48 ĩndĩ mayaaona nzĩa meka ũu, nĩkwĩthĩwa andũ onthe matindaa mamwĩthukĩĩsye matekwenda kũvĩtũkwa nĩ kateto." 
Luke20:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ e Ĩkalũnĩ akĩmanyĩsya andũ na kũtavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo, athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na atumĩa nĩmaendie vala ũĩ," 
Luke20:2 na mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Kwa tũtavye, wĩĩka maũndũ aa na ũkũmũ mwaũ, na nũũ ũkũnengete ũkũmũ ũsu wa kũmeka?”" 
Luke20:3 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ, “O nakwa nĩngũmũkũlya ĩkũlyo. Kwa ndavyei," 
Luke20:4 Yoana anengetwe ũkũmũ wa kũvatisa nĩ andũ kana anengetwe nĩ Ngai?” 
Luke20:5 Namo mambĩĩa kũoany'a maikũlany'a atĩĩ, “Twĩasya ata? Twasya, ‘Anengetwe nĩ Ngai,’ etũkũlya, ‘Nĩkĩ ĩndĩ mũtaaĩtĩkĩla ũvoo wa Yoana?’" 
Luke20:6 Na tũkasya, ‘Anengetwe nĩ andũ,’ andũ aa onthe no matũkimange na mavia, nũndũ onthe nĩmesĩ nesa kana Yoana aĩ mwathani.”" 
Luke20:7 Kwoou nĩmasũngĩie Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Tũyĩsĩ anengetwe ũkũmũ nũũ.”" 
Luke20:8 Nake Yesũ amea, “O nakwa ndimũtavya nĩĩka maũndũ aa na ũkũmũ mwaũ.”" 
Luke20:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watavisye andũ na ngelekany'o amea: “Ve mũndũ ũmwe wavandie mũũndanĩ wake wa mĩsavivũ na aũkomboethya aĩmi, na ĩndĩ athi kyalo kĩasa nthĩ ĩngĩ." 
Luke20:10 Yĩla ĩvinda ya kũketha nzavivũ yavikie, nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi ũmwe wake akanengwe kĩlungu kĩla kyake nĩ aĩmi amũetee. Ĩndĩ aĩmi nĩmavũie mũthũkũmi ũsu na mamũlũngya athi ate na kĩndũ." 
Luke20:11 Mwene mũũnda nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi ũngĩ, namo aĩmi mamũvũa ũsu o nake, na mamũumanga na mamũlũngya athi ate na kĩndũ." 
Luke20:12 Nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi wa katatũ, nake ũsu aĩmi mamũũmĩsya mũno na mamwĩkya nza." 
Luke20:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwene mũũnda weekũlilye, ‘Yu nĩĩka ata? Nĩtũma mwana wakwa mwendwa; nĩvatonyeka makamũnenga ndaĩa!’" 
Luke20:14 Ĩndĩ yĩla aĩmi moonie mwana ũsu meeana, ‘Ũũ nĩwe ũkanengwa mũũnda ũũ nĩ ĩthe; tũmũae na ũtiĩwa ũkatw'ĩka witũ.’" 
Luke20:15 Kwoou mamũtwaa nza wa mũũnda ũsu na mamũaa.” Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye andũ atĩĩ, “Yuĩ, mwene mũũnda akeekana ata na aĩmi asu?" 
Luke20:16 Akooka amoae, na aikomboethya andũ angĩ mũũnda ũsu wake.” Yĩla andũ meewie ũu masya atĩĩ, “Ai, ũndũ ta ũsu ndũkaaĩthĩwe!”" 
Luke20:17 Yesũ nĩwamasyaisye na amakũlya atĩĩ, “Nayu maandĩko aa methĩawa mayasya ata? ‘Ĩvia yĩla yaleilwe nĩ aki ma myako, nĩyĩtw'ĩkĩte ĩvia yĩla ya vata mũno mwakonĩ.’" 
Luke20:18 Mũndũ ũla wĩvalũka ĩũlũ wa ĩvia yĩu, akavevenzeka, na ethĩwa ĩvia yĩu yĩkavalũkĩla mũndũ, yĩkamũtumba anyaĩĩke vyũ.”" 
Luke20:19 Amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na athembi anene nĩmendie kũmũkwata Yesũ saanĩ ũsu, nũndũ nĩmamanyie kana etavanasya ngelekany'o ĩsu aimatina, ĩndĩ makĩa andũ." 
Luke20:20 Kwoou nĩmambĩĩie kũmantha mwanya mũseo, na matũma andũ amwe mathi makeyĩkalye ta aseo, na maimũkũlya Yesũ makũlyo mamũteete aneene ũndũ ũtaĩlĩte, nĩ kana matonye kũmũsikata kwa ngavana." 
Luke20:21 Andũ asu nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, nĩtwĩsĩ kana ũneenaa na kũmanyĩsya ũla w'o. Ndwĩkaa ũndũ wendeesye mũndũ, ĩndĩ ũmanyĩasya andũ kwenda kwa Ngai kwa nzĩa ĩla mbaĩlu." 
Luke20:22 Kwa tũtavye, nĩ waĩlu kũĩva mũsumbĩ wa Loma koti? Tũmũĩvae kana tũlee?”" 
Luke20:23 Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũseleke woo na amea atĩĩ," 
Luke20:24 “Kwa mbony'ei ndinalĩ ĩmwe. Visa ũsu na ĩsyĩtwa yĩu nĩ syaũ?” Namo mamũsũngĩa, “Nĩ sya mũsumbĩ wa Loma.”" 
Luke20:25 Kwoou Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Nengai ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ kĩla kya mũsumbĩ, na mũinenga Ngai kĩla kya Ngai.”" 
Luke20:26 Andũ asu mayaatonya kũmũkwatya Yesũ kwĩsĩla ndetonĩ ila waneeneie mbee wa andũ. Ĩndĩ nĩmaseng'ie mũno nĩ ũsũngĩo wake na mavindya. 
Luke20:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amwe ma Asatũkai, ala maasya kana andũ maikathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ, maendie vala ve Yesũ na mamũkũlya atĩĩ," 
Luke20:28 “Mũmanyĩsya, Mwose nĩwatũandĩkĩie Mwĩao ũũ: ‘Ethĩwa mũndũ nĩwakw'a atia mũka ate kana, no nginya mwana-a-inyia ose mũndũ mũka ũsu ndiwa, nĩ kana asyaie mwana-a-inyia syana.’" 
Luke20:29 Yuĩ, kwaĩ aũme mũonza ma inyia ũmwe. Ũla mũkũũ nĩwatwaanie na akw'a atia mũka ate kana." 
Luke20:30 Ũla ũmũatĩĩe nĩwatwaie mũndũ mũka ũsu," 
Luke20:31 o na wa katatũ eeka oou. Onthe me mũonza nĩmamũtwaie, na vai ũmwe waatia kana aikw'a." 
Luke20:32 Ĩtina mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwakwie o nake. 
Luke20:33 Yu ĩndĩ, mũthenya ũla akw'ũ makathayũũka, mũndũ mũka ũsu akeethĩwa e mũka wa wĩva, na onthe me mũonza nĩmamũtwaĩte?”" 
Luke20:34 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ, “Andũ ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ nĩmatwaanaa na makatwawa," 
Luke20:35 ĩndĩ andũ ala makoneka maĩlĩte kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ ĩvindanĩ yĩu, maikethĩwa maitwaana kana kũtwawa." 
Luke20:36 Maikethĩwa matonya kũkw'a nũndũ makeethĩwa mailyĩ ta alaĩka, na nĩ syana sya Ngai kwa kũthayũũkw'a kuma kwa akw'ũ." 
Luke20:37 Naw'o ũndũ wa kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ, o nake Mwose nũĩkĩĩthĩtye ũndũ ũsu Maandĩkonĩ Matheu, vala vawetete ĩũlũ wa kakuthu kakene. Vau nũmwĩtĩte Mwĩai, ‘Ngai wa Avalaamu, Ngai wa Isaka, na Ngai wa Yakovo.’" 
Luke20:38 We ti Ngai wa ala akw'ũ, ĩndĩ nĩ Ngai wa ala me thayũ, nũndũ kwake andũ onthe me thayũ.”" 
Luke20:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩsya amwe ma Mĩao mamwĩie atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, wasũngĩa nesa.”" 
Luke20:40 Ĩtina wa ũu, vai mũndũ waatata kũmũkũlya ũndũ ĩngĩ." 
Luke20:41 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Andũ matonya ata kwasya kana Klĩsto nĩ nzyawa ya Ndeviti?" 
Luke20:42 Ndeviti mwene nũneenete ĩvukunĩ ya Savulĩ akasya, ‘Ngai nĩwamwĩie Mwĩai wakwa:" 
Luke20:43 Ĩkala nthĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwakwa kwa aũme, kũvika yĩla nĩmaia amaitha maku ungu wa ũtonyi waku.’" 
Luke20:44 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ndeviti eetie Klĩsto, ‘Mwĩai,’ kũtonyeka ata Klĩsto ethĩwe e nzyawa yake?”" 
Luke20:45 Yesũ nĩwatavisye amanyĩw'a make andũ onthe methukĩĩsye amea atĩĩ," 
Luke20:46 “Ĩsũvĩanei na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao; mendete kũthi mekĩĩte ngũa ndaasa, na kũkethaw'a na ndaĩa me ndũnyũ. O ta ũu mendete kwĩkala ivĩlanĩ sya mbee nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa, na kwĩkala kũndũ kwa ndaĩa me mbokanĩ." 
Luke20:47 Nĩmavenaa aka ndiwa syĩndũ syoo, na kwĩseũvya kwa kũvoya mboya ndaasa. Ũsilĩlo woo ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũnene mũno.”" 
Luke21:1 Yesũ nĩwasyaĩĩisye andũ, na oona ũndũ andũ athwii meekĩaa mĩvothi yoo kĩnandũnĩ kya Ĩkalũ." 
Luke21:2 O ta ũu nĩwoonie kĩveti kĩmwe ndiwa na kĩtaĩ kĩndũ kyeekĩa tũsumunĩ twĩlĩ. 
Luke21:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waisye atĩĩ, “Nĩmũtavya w'o, kĩveti kĩĩ ndiwa na kĩte syĩndũ, nĩkyo kyaumya mbingĩ kũte andũ ala angĩ onthe." 
Luke21:4 Nũndũ andũ ala angĩ onthe meumasya nũndũ wa kwingĩvĩwa, ĩndĩ kyo o na kau nĩ ngya, kyaumya kyonthe kĩla kĩĩ kĩkwatya kwondũ wa mavata makyo onthe.”" 
Luke21:5 Amanyĩw'a amwe ma Yesũ nĩmaneenaa ĩũlũ wa Ĩkalũ, ũndũ yanakavĩtw'e nĩ mavia ala yakĩtwe namo, na mĩthĩnzĩo ĩla yaumĩw'e Ngai. Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ," 
Luke21:6 “Syĩndũ ii mũkwona, ve ĩvinda yũkĩte wĩthĩe vai ĩvia o na yĩmwe yĩkatiwa yĩ ĩũlũ wa yĩngĩ; syonthe ikaomboangwa vyũ.”" 
Luke21:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, maũndũ aa makeethĩwa ĩndĩĩ, na nĩ kyaũ kĩkwonany'a kana ĩvinda nĩ ĩviku maũndũ asu methĩwe?”" 
Luke21:8 Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Ĩkalai mwĩsũvĩĩte na mũiketĩkĩle mũndũ o na wĩva amũkenge. Andũ aingĩ makooka na ĩsyĩtwa yakwa mayasya, ‘Ninyie Klĩsto,’ na, ‘Ĩvinda nĩ ĩviku!’ Mũikatate kũmaatĩĩa." 
Luke21:9 Yĩla mwĩĩw'a ituu sya makaũ na ithokoo mũikaamake, nũndũ maũndũ asu no nginya meamba kwĩthĩwa, ĩndĩ maikethĩwa mayonany'a kana ĩvinda ya mũminũkĩlyo nĩ ĩviku.”" 
Luke21:10 Nĩwaendeeie na kũmatavya amea atĩĩ, “Nthĩ ĩkakwatya kaũ na ĩngĩ, na ũsumbĩ ũkavithũkĩa ũngĩ." 
Luke21:11 Kũkeethĩwa itetemo nthũku sya nthĩ, na kũkeethĩwa mayũa kũũ na kũũ na mowau mathũku mũno. O ta ũu kũkeethĩwa syĩndũ sya kũtelemya na mawonany'o manene yayayanĩ." 
Luke21:12 Ĩndĩ maũndũ aa onthe matanamba kwĩthĩwa nĩmũkakwatwa na kũthĩnw'a. Mũkatwawa nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa mũkasilĩlwe na mũyovwa yela. O ta ũu nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa mwĩ aatĩĩi makwa, mũkatwawa mbee wa makavana na asumbĩ." 
Luke21:13 Yĩu yĩkeethĩwa ĩvinda yenyu ya kwĩthĩwa mwĩ ngũsĩ. 
Luke21:14 Kwoou tw'ai ngoonĩ syenyu kana mũikambaa kũtinda mũisũanĩa ũndũ mũũthi kũneena," 
Luke21:15 nũndũ nyie ngamũnenga ũĩ wa kũmanya ndeto sya kũneena, ila amaitha menyu matakethĩwa matonya kwilea kana kwikananĩa." 
Luke21:16 O na nĩmũkathoow'a nĩ ana-a-inyia menyu, andũ ma mũsyĩ na anyanyae menyu; na amwe menyu nĩmakoawa." 
Luke21:17 Mũkamenwa nĩ kĩla mũndũ nũndũ wakwa. 
Luke21:18 Ĩndĩ vai ũsw'ĩĩ o na ũmwe wa mĩtwe yenyu ũkaa. 
Luke21:19 Kwa kũmĩĩsya kwenyu mũkakwata thayũ ũtathela. 
Luke21:20 “Yĩla mũkona Yelũsalemu yathyũlũlũkwa nĩ asikalĩ ma kaũ, mwĩmanya kana kwanangwa kwayo kwĩ vakuvĩ." 
Luke21:21 Andũ ala meĩthĩwa Yutia mekĩa mathi iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ. Ala makethĩwa Yelũsalemu nthĩnĩ meuma vo mathi. Namo andũ ala makethĩwa na ku motũinĩ, maikaatate kũthi Yelũsalemu." 
Luke21:22 Ĩsu ĩkeethĩwa yĩ mĩthenya ya ũĩvanĩsyo, nĩ kana maũndũ onthe ala mawetetwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu meanĩe." 
Luke21:23 Tei nĩ kwa aka ala makethĩwa me aito na ala makethĩwa mena twana tũnini tũkwonga! Kũkeethĩwa thĩna mwingĩ mũno ĩũlũ wa nthĩ, na ũthatu wa Ngai ũkatheea ĩũlũ wa andũ aa." 
Luke21:24 Amwe moo makooawa na mbyũ, na angĩ maitavwa manyaĩĩkw'e nthĩ syonthe. Yelũsalemu nayo ĩkakinyangĩwa nthĩ nĩ Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ, kũvika yĩla ĩvinda yoo yĩkathela." 
Luke21:25 “Maũndũ ma kũseng'ya makeekĩka syũanĩ, mweinĩ, na ndatanĩ. Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ mbaĩ sya andũ ĩkeethĩwa mathĩnanĩ itesĩ ũndũ ikwĩka, nũndũ wa kĩlitũko kya ũkanga na kũkĩlany'a kwa itulumo." 
Luke21:26 Andũ makatw'ĩka nda nĩ w'ĩa, meteelete kĩla kyũkĩte ĩũlũ wa nthĩ, nũndũ mavinya ma syĩndũ ila syĩ yayayanĩ makathingithangw'a." 
Luke21:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makamwona Mwana wa Mũndũ okĩte e mathweonĩ, e na ũtonyi na ndaĩa nene." 
Luke21:28 Mwoona maũndũ asu mambĩĩa kwĩkĩka, mwĩũngama na kũng'elela ĩũlũ, nũndũ wovosyo wenyu ũkeethĩwa wĩ vakuvĩ.”" 
Luke21:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamatavisye ngelekany'o ĩno: “Kwa sũanĩai ĩũlũ wa mũkũyũ, o vamwe na mĩtĩ ĩla ĩngĩ yonthe." 
Luke21:30 Yambĩlĩĩlya kũthongoosya matũ, nĩmũmanyaa kana ĩvinda ya mbua yĩ vakuvĩ." 
Luke21:31 No ta ũu, mwoona maũndũ asu mayĩkĩka, mwĩmanya kana ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩ vakuvĩ." 
Luke21:32 “Nĩmũtavya w'o, maũndũ aa makeekĩka andũ ala me thayũ yu tũĩ matanakw'a onthe makathela." 
Luke21:33 Ĩtu na nthĩ ikathela, ĩndĩ ndeto syakwa ikekala tene na tene." 
Luke21:34 “Ĩkalaai mwĩsũvĩĩte, ngoo syenyu iikakwatwe nĩ ũyi na ũnywi na mawĩmakĩo ma thayũ ũũ, naw'o Mũthenya ũsu ũimũkĩa kwa kĩthũlũmũko." 
Luke21:35 Mũthenya ũsu ũkooka ta mũteo kwa andũ onthe ala me ĩũlũ wa nthĩ. 
Luke21:36 Kwoou ĩkalaai mwĩyũmbanĩtye na kũvoyaa kĩla ĩvinda, mũnengwe kũsinda maũndũ asu onthe makekĩka, na kũũngama mbee wa Mwana wa Mũndũ.”" 
Luke21:37 Kĩla mũthenya ĩvindanĩ yĩu, Yesũ eethĩawa Ĩkalũnĩ akĩmanyĩsya andũ, ĩndĩ ĩa mawĩoo aendaa Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata kwĩkala vo." 
Luke21:38 Kĩoko tene kĩla mũthenya, andũ onthe nĩmaendaa Ĩkalũnĩ kũmwĩthukĩĩsya." 
Luke22:1 Ĩvinda nĩyathengeeie ya Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota, ĩla yĩtawa Vasaka." 
Luke22:2 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmamanthaa nzĩa ya kũmũaa Yesũ mevithĩte, nũndũ nĩmakĩaa andũ." 
Luke22:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Satani walikile nthĩnĩ wa Yutasi ũla wĩtawa Ĩsikalioti, nake aĩ ũmwe wa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ." 
Luke22:4 Kwoou Yutasi nĩwaendie na aneena na athembi anene na andũ ala masungaa Ĩkalũ, ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũtonya kũmũthoosya Yesũ kũla maĩ." 
Luke22:5 Nĩmatanie mũno na mamwatha kũmũnenge mbesa. 
Luke22:6 Yutasi nĩweetĩkĩlile na ambĩĩa kũmantha mwanya mũseo wa kũmũthoosya Yesũ kũla maĩ andũ matesĩ. 
Luke22:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũthenya wa Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota wavikie, yĩla kalondu ka Mboka ya Vasaka kathĩnzawa." 
Luke22:8 Yesũ nĩwatũmie Vetelo na Yoana amea atĩĩ, “Endai mũkatũseũvĩsye Mboka ya Vasaka tũke kũya.”" 
Luke22:9 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Wĩenda tũkamĩseũvĩsye va?”" 
Luke22:10 Nake amea, “Mwalika mũsyĩnĩ mũnene wa Yelũsalemu, nĩmũũkomana na mũndũ-ũme ũkuĩte kĩkuu kya kĩw'ũ. Mũatĩĩei, na nyũmba ĩla ũkũthi kũlika," 
Luke22:11 mũyĩa mwene wayo atĩĩ, ‘Mũmanyĩsya aũkũlya: Ĩĩva nyũmba ĩla nyie na amanyĩw'a makwa tũkũĩĩa Mboka ya Vasaka?’" 
Luke22:12 Nũkũmwony'a nyũmba nene yĩ ngolovanĩ yĩna kĩla kĩndũ; seũvĩsyai vau.” 
Luke22:13 Amanyĩw'a asu nĩmaendie na meethĩa kĩla kĩndũ kĩilyĩ o ũndũ Yesũ wamatavĩtye, na maseũvya Mboka ya Vasaka." 
Luke22:14 Yĩla saa wavikie, Yesũ nĩwaendie e na atũmwa make mekala nthĩ maye." 
Luke22:15 Nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Nĩtwĩe ngyenda mũno kũya mboka ĩno ya Vasaka vamwe nenyu ndanamba kũthĩnw'a," 
Luke22:16 nũndũ nĩmũtavya w'o, ndikamĩya ĩngĩ kũvika ĩnengwe wĩanĩu wayo ũsumbĩnĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Luke22:17 Yesũ nĩwoosie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai, atũnga mũvea na amea atĩĩ, “Kwatai kĩĩ mũnyusanĩe inyw'onthe;" 
Luke22:18 nũndũ nĩmũtavya w'o, kuma yu ndikanyw'a ndivai ĩngĩ kũvika ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wũke.”" 
Luke22:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woosie mũkate, atũnga mũvea kwa Ngai; nĩwaũtilangile na aũnenga amanyĩw'a make ayasya, “Ũũ nĩ mwĩĩ wakwa, ũla ũũnenganwe kwondũ wenyu. Ĩkaai ũu kwondũ wa kũndilikana.”" 
Luke22:20 Kwa nzĩa o ĩsu nĩwamanengie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai ĩtina wa lĩu wa wĩoo ayasya atĩĩ, “Kĩkombe kĩĩ nĩ ũtianĩo mweũ nthakamenĩ yakwa ĩla ĩkwĩtĩkw'a kwondũ wenyu." 
Luke22:21 “Ĩndĩ manyai kana mũndũ ũla ũkũnthoosya kwa amaitha e o vaa aiya nakwa! 
Luke22:22 Kwa w'o Mwana wa Mũndũ ekw'a o kwĩanana na ũtw'ĩo wa Ngai, ĩndĩ kyeva nĩ kwa mũndũ ũsu ũkũmũthoosya kwa amaitha.”" 
Luke22:23 Namo mambĩĩa kũkũlany'a nũũ katĩ woo ũtonya kwĩka ũndũ ũsu. 
Luke22:24 Ngananĩo nĩyambĩĩe katĩ wa amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ, maikũlany'a ũla katĩ woo waĩlĩte kwoswa ta we mũnene." 
Luke22:25 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Asumbĩ ma Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ masumbĩkaa andũ moo na kĩthũi, na kwendaa metwe atethya ma andũ." 
Luke22:26 Ĩndĩ ũu ti w'o kwaĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa kũilyĩ katĩ wenyu. Vandũ va ũu, ũla mũnene katĩ wenyu no nginya ethĩwe ta we mũnini, nake mũtongoi ayĩthĩwa ta mũthũkũmi." 
Luke22:27 Nũndũ ũla mũnene nũũ: Nĩ ũla ũilyĩ nthĩ aetewe lĩu, kana nĩ ũla ũkũnengane lĩu? Kwa w'o, nĩ ũla ũilyĩ nthĩ aetewe lĩu. Ĩndĩ nyie nĩilyĩ ta mũthũkũmi katĩ wenyu." 
Luke22:28 “Inyw'ĩ nĩmwaendeeie kwĩkala nakwa ĩvindanĩ yũmũ yĩla nĩnaĩ nayo. 
Luke22:29 Kwoou o tondũ Ĩthe wakwa wanengie ũkũmũ wa kũsumbĩka, o nakwa nĩngũmũnenga ũkũmũ ũsu." 
Luke22:30 Mũkaya na kũnyw'a vamwe nakwa ũsumbĩnĩ wakwa, na mũkekalĩla ivĩla sya kĩ-ũsumbĩ mũsumbĩke mbaĩ ĩkũmi na ilĩ sya Ĩsilaeli." 
Luke22:31 “Simioni, Simioni, ĩthukĩĩsye! Satani nũkũlilye mwanya amũthingithangye o tondũ mũndũ ũthingithangasya nganũ aiũlũkya." 
Luke22:32 Ĩndĩ nĩngũvoyeie nĩ kana ndũkasye mũĩkĩĩo, na kwoou wanzyokea ĩngĩ, wĩlũlũmĩĩlya ana-a-au.”" 
Luke22:33 Nake Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ, “Mwĩai, nyie nĩnĩyũmbanĩtye kũthi yela vamwe naku o na kũawa vamwe naku!”" 
Luke22:34 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Vetelo eka ngũtavye, ũtukũ ũũ nzamba ĩtanamba kwasya, nũũkaĩa katatũ wasye ndũmbĩsĩ.”" 
Luke22:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Yĩla namũtũmie mũthi mũtakuĩte ngusu ya mbesa, kana mũvuko, kana iatũ, ve kĩndũ kyaamwaĩa?” Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa “Aiee, vai kĩndũ kyaatwaĩa.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Ĩndĩ yu, ũla wĩ na ngusu ya mbesa na mũvuko wa kwĩkĩa syĩndũ nĩakue. Na ũla ũte na ũvyũ, nĩ kavaa athoosye ngũa yake ya ĩũlũ athooe." 
Luke22:37 Nĩmũtavya kana Maandĩko Matheu ala maĩtye ‘Nĩwatalanĩlw'e vamwe na avĩtany'a,’ no nginya meanĩe kwakwa, nũndũ maũndũ ala maandĩkĩtwe ĩũlũ wakwa nĩmekwĩanĩa.”" 
Luke22:38 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Mwĩai, kwa sisya, vaa twĩ na mbyũ ilĩ.” Nake amea, “Nũu ĩndĩ.”" 
Luke22:39 Yesũ nĩwaumie Yelũsalemu na athi Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata, o tondũ wakothaa kwĩka, na amanyĩw'a maendany'a nake." 
Luke22:40 Avika vo nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ, “Voyai mũikalike matatwanĩ.”" 
Luke22:41 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waumie vala maĩ aendanga mbee vanini, atulya ndu na avoya ayasya," 
Luke22:42 “Asa, ethĩwa nũkwenda, mbetangĩe kĩkombe kĩĩ kya mathĩna. Kũikethĩwe kwĩanana na kwenda kwakwa, ĩndĩ kwenda kwaku nĩkwĩkĩke.” [" 
Luke22:43 Mũlaĩka kuma ĩtunĩ nĩwamumĩlĩĩle na amũlũlũmĩĩlya. 
Luke22:44 Nake aĩ na mathĩna manene ngoonĩ na kwoou ongeleela kũvoya na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo, na aumwa nĩ yuutĩa yĩvw'ana nthakame ĩyĩtĩka nthĩ.]" 
Luke22:45 Yĩla wookĩlile kuma mboyanĩ, nĩwasyokie vala ve amanyĩw'a make na eethĩa makomie nĩ kĩmako." 
Luke22:46 Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Mũkomete nĩkĩ? Amũkai mũvoye mũikalike matatwanĩ.”" 
Luke22:47 Yesũ o aendee na kũneena, nĩvookie nguthu ya andũ, na Yutasi ũmwe wa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ nĩwe wamatongoesye. Nĩwaendie vala ve Yesũ amũkethye na ngethi ya wendo." 
Luke22:48 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Yutasi, wĩthoosya Mwana wa Mũndũ kwa kũmũkethya na ngethi ya wendo?”" 
Luke22:49 Yĩla amanyĩw'a ala maĩ na Yesũ moonie kĩla kyaĩ vakuvĩ kwĩkĩka nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Mwĩai, tũtũmĩe mbyũ sitũ yu?”" 
Luke22:50 Na ũmwe woo atema mũthũkũmi wa Mũthembi Mũnene amũtila kũtũ kwa ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwa aũme. 
Luke22:51 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Ekanai na ũndũ ũsu!” Na akwata mũndũ ũsu kũtũ kũu akũvosya." 
Luke22:52 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye andũ ala mookĩte kũmũkwata, ala nĩ athembi anene, andũ ala masungaa Ĩkalũ, na atumĩa atĩĩ, “Mwooka kũngwata mũkuĩte mbyũ na nzũma ko nĩ kĩng'endilĩ?" 
Luke22:53 Yĩla nĩneethĩawa nenyu Ĩkalũnĩ kĩla mũthenya mũyaaĩtĩkĩla kũngwata, ĩndĩ yĩĩ nĩyo ĩvinda yenyu yĩla kũsumbĩkĩtwe nĩ kĩvindu.”" 
Luke22:54 Andũ asu nĩmamũkwatie Yesũ mamũtwaa mũsyĩ kwa Mũthembi ũla Mũnene. Vetelo amaumĩte ĩtina ĩndĩ e vaasa. 
Luke22:55 Vaĩ mwaki wavuvĩtwe katĩ kĩwanzanĩ kĩla kyaĩ nza kwa Mũthembi ũla Mũnene, na Vetelo athi ekala nthĩ vamwe na ala mailyĩ vo maiwota." 
Luke22:56 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwĩĩtu ũmwe mũthũkũmi wamwonie ailyĩ nthĩ kyeninĩ, amũketeea mũno na asya atĩĩ, “Mũndũ ũũ anaĩ vamwe na Yesũ.”" 
Luke22:57 Ĩndĩ Vetelo akaĩa asya, “We mwĩĩtu ũũ, nyie o na ndyĩsĩ mũndũ ũsu!”" 
Luke22:58 Ĩtina wa kavinda o kanini, mũndũ ũngĩ nĩwamwonie Vetelo na amwĩa atĩĩ, “We wĩ ũmwe wa andũ asu!” Ĩndĩ Vetelo amũsũngĩa asya, “We mũndũ-ũme ũũ, nyie ndi ũmwe!”" 
Luke22:59 Ĩtina wa vandũ va ĩsaa yĩmwe, mũndũ ũngĩ o nake nĩwathing'ĩĩisye kwasya atĩĩ, “Kwa w'o mũndũ ũũ anaĩ vamwe na Yesũ, nũndũ o nake aumĩte Kalilii.”" 
Luke22:60 Ĩndĩ Vetelo asũngĩa asya atĩĩ, “Wee, nyie ndyĩsĩ kĩla ũũneena!” Saanĩ o ũsu aendee na kũneena nzamba nĩyaisye." 
Luke22:61 Mwĩai nĩweethyũũie amũsisya Vetelo, na Vetelo alilikana kana Mwĩai eĩmwĩĩte, “Ũtukũ ũũ nzamba ĩtanasya, nũũkaĩa katatũ wasye ndũmbĩsĩ.”" 
Luke22:62 Vetelo nĩwaumaalile nza na aĩa mũno na woo mwingĩ. 
Luke22:63 Andũ ala masungaa Yesũ nĩmamũthekeeie na mamũvũa. 
Luke22:64 Nĩmamwovie metho na mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Kwa tũtavye nũũ ũla waũkũna?”" 
Luke22:65 Nĩmamũneeneie syĩndũ mbingĩ makĩmũumanga. 
Luke22:66 Kwatheatheana, atumĩa na athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmoombanie, na Yesũ aetwe nzamanĩ ĩsu. Nĩmamwĩie atĩĩ," 
Luke22:67 “Ethĩwa nue Klĩsto, tũtavye.” Nake amea, “O na namũtavya mũiĩkĩĩa," 
Luke22:68 na ngamũkũlya ĩkũlyo mũinzũngĩa. 
Luke22:69 Ĩndĩ kuma yu Mwana wa Mũndũ akeethĩawa ailyĩ nthĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwa aũme kwa Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe.” 
Luke22:70 Onthe nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Nayu nue Mwana wa Ngai?” Nake asũngĩa asya, “Inyw'ĩ nĩmwaneena.”" 
Luke22:71 Namo masya atĩĩ, “Twĩenda ũkũsĩ ũngĩ wakĩ? Ithyĩ nĩtweeyĩw'ĩa kĩla we mwene waneena!”" 
Luke23:1 Nzama ĩsu yonthe nĩyoombũũkie na yamũtwaa Yesũ kwa Vilato. 
Luke23:2 Vau nĩmamũsikatie masya atĩĩ, “Tweethĩa mũndũ ũũ aitiĩthya andũ maitũ nzĩa, na kũmea maikambĩle kũĩva mũsumbĩ wa Loma koti, na ayasya kana nĩwe Klĩsto, mũsumbĩ.”" 
Luke23:3 Vilato nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “We nue mũsumbĩ wa Ayuti?” Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa, “We nĩwaneena.”" 
Luke23:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato weeie athembi anene na ĩkomano ya andũ yĩla yaĩ vau atĩĩ, “Nyie ndikwona ĩvĩtyo mũndũ ũũ wĩkĩte.”" 
Luke23:5 Ĩndĩ mathing'ĩĩsya mũno mayasya atĩĩ, “Nũthokoanĩtye andũ onthe ma Yutia na momanyĩsyo make, ambĩĩe Kalilii kũka kũvika o na vaa.”" 
Luke23:6 Yĩla Vilato weewie ũu nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ, “Mũndũ ũũ aumĩte Kalilii?”" 
Luke23:7 Amina kũmanya kana Yesũ aumĩte kĩsionĩ kĩla Elote wasumbĩkĩte, nĩwaisye atwawe kwa Elote, ũla waĩ Yelũsalemu ĩvindanĩ yĩu." 
Luke23:8 Yĩla Elote wamwonie Yesũ, nĩwatanie mũno nũndũ nĩwekalĩte ĩvinda ĩasa ayenda kũmwona, nũndũ nĩweew'ĩte ũvoo wake na nĩwendaa mũno kwona ayĩka syama." 
Luke23:9 Nĩwamũkũlilye makũlyo maingĩ, ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaasũngĩa o na yĩmwe." 
Luke23:10 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao maũngamĩte vau maendee na kũmũsikatĩĩa Yesũ na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo. 
Luke23:11 Elote vamwe na asikalĩ make nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ na mamũvũthĩĩsya mũno. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamwĩkĩie ngũa mbanake ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ na mamũtũnga kwa Vilato. 
Luke23:12 Kuma mũthenya ũsu, Elote na Vilato, o na kau matwĩe me ũthũ, nĩmatumie ndũũ." 
Luke23:13 Vilato nĩweetie athembi anene, atongoi, na andũ ala angĩ onthe" 
Luke23:14 amea atĩĩ, “Mũndeteie mũndũ ũũ na mwambĩa kana etiĩthya andũ nzĩa. Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa kũmũkũlya makũlyo mwĩ vo, ndinona avĩtĩtye ũndũnĩ o na ũmwe katĩ wa ala mwĩĩmũsikatĩe." 
Luke23:15 Elote o nake ndanamwona e na mavĩtyo, na nĩkyo kĩtumi wamũtũnga kũla tũĩ. Kwa w'o, vai ũndũ wĩkĩte ũtuma atw'ĩĩwa kũawa." 
Luke23:16 Kwoou nĩĩka kwasya akũnwe ivoko na ngĩmũlekya athi.” 
Luke23:17 [Kĩla ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Vasaka, Vilato aĩ athaĩsye andũ mwovwa ũmwe.]" 
Luke23:18 Andũ onthe nĩmaneenie na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ, “Ũaa mũndũ ũsu na ũitũthaĩsya Valava!”" 
Luke23:19 (Valava oovetwe yela nũndũ wa ithokoo syookĩlĩte Yelũsalemu vakoawa andũ.) 
Luke23:20 Vilato nĩwaneenie na ĩkomano ĩngĩ nũndũ nĩwendaa athasye Yesũ. 
Luke23:21 Ĩndĩ malonzany'a na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ, “Mwambe! Mwambe!”" 
Luke23:22 Vilato nĩwamakũlilye ĩvinda ya katatũ, “Nĩkĩ? Ekĩte ĩvĩtyo yaũ? Nyie ndikwona ĩvĩtyo wĩkĩte yĩtuma atw'ĩĩwa kũawa. Kwoou nĩĩka kwasya nĩakũnwe ivoko na ngĩmũlekya athi.”" 
Luke23:23 Ĩndĩ maendeea na kũlonzanĩĩlya na wasya mũnene mũno, mayasya kana Yesũ no nginya ambwe." 
Luke23:24 Kwoou Vilato amũtw'ĩĩa Yesũ kwĩanana na wendi woo. 
Luke23:25 Nĩwamathaĩisye mũndũ ũla meetĩtye, ũla woovetwe yela nũndũ wa ithokoo syaĩ kw'o, na nũndũ wa kũaa andũ, na anengane Yesũ kwoo mekane nake ũndũ mekwenda." 
Luke23:26 Asikalĩ mamumaalĩtye Yesũ, nĩmakwatie mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Simioni kuma Kũlene, aendete mũsyĩnĩ wa Yelũsalemu, na mamwilĩĩla ngelany'o amĩkue aumĩte Yesũ ĩtina." 
Luke23:27 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamũatĩĩie Yesũ, na katĩ woo vaĩ aka mamũĩĩaa mauĩte mbu." 
Luke23:28 Yesũ nĩwamavĩndũkĩie amea atĩĩ, “Aka ma Yelũsalemu! Ekai kũndĩĩa; ĩyĩĩei inyw'ĩ ene na syana syenyu." 
Luke23:29 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla andũ makasya, ‘Nĩ aathime aka ala ngũngũ, ala mataasyaa na mataaongya.’" 
Luke23:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makambĩĩa kwĩa iĩma, ‘Tũvalũkĩlei,’ na mayĩa tũlĩma, ‘Tũvw'ĩkei!’" 
Luke23:31 Nũndũ ethĩwa nĩmekwĩka maũndũ aa mũtĩnĩ mwĩũ, mũtĩ mũmũ makawĩka ata?”" 
Luke23:32 O ta ũu vaĩ andũ elĩ ing'endilĩ matwaĩtwe makoawe vamwe na Yesũ. 
Luke23:33 Yĩla mavikie vala vandũ vetawa Kĩng'ala nĩmamwambie Yesũ ngelany'onĩ, na o ta ũu mamba ila ing'endilĩ ilĩ; kĩmwe ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aume, na kĩla kĩngĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aka." 
Luke23:34 Yesũ nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ, “Asa, ekea andũ aa nũndũ mayĩsĩ ũndũ mekwĩka.” Nĩmaanie ngũa syake kwa kũkũna kula, nĩ kana mamanye ngũa ĩla mũndũ ũkwosa." 
Luke23:35 Andũ nĩmaũngamie vau masyaĩĩsye, namo atongoi ma Ayuti nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ mayasya atĩĩ, “Nĩwatangĩĩie andũ aingĩ; ndetangĩĩe yu ethĩwa nĩwe Klĩsto, Ũla Ũnyuvĩtwe nĩ Ngai.”" 
Luke23:36 Asikalĩ o namo nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ. Nĩmathengeeie vala ũĩ na mamũnenga ndivai ngaatu," 
Luke23:37 na mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Ethĩwa nue mũsumbĩ wa Ayuti ĩtangĩĩe!”" 
Luke23:38 Vau ngelany'onĩ ĩũlũ wa mũtwe vaĩ maandĩko maasya, “ŨŨ NĨWE MŨSUMBĨ WA AYUTI.”" 
Luke23:39 Kĩng'endilĩ kĩmwe kya isu syambĩtwe vamwe na Yesũ nĩkyamũumangie kĩimwĩa atĩĩ, “We noue Klĩsto? Ndwĩtangĩĩe na ũitũtangĩĩa!”" 
Luke23:40 Ĩndĩ kĩng'endilĩ kĩla kĩngĩ kyakĩkany'a kĩyasya atĩĩ, “We no wĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai na ũtw'ĩĩwe ũndũ ũmwe na mũndũ ũũ?" 
Luke23:41 Nyie nĩ naku twatw'ĩĩwa kĩla kĩtwaĩlĩte, nũndũ tũendee na ũkwata ũĩvĩthyo ũla wa w'o wa mavĩtyo maitũ, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũũ nde ũndũ mũthũku wĩkĩte.”" 
Luke23:42 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩng'endilĩ kĩu kyamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ, “Wĩndilikana walika ũsumbĩnĩ waku!”" 
Luke23:43 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Nĩkũtavya kana ũmũnthĩ nũkwĩthĩwa nakwa ũtanunĩ.”" 
Luke23:44 Kuma ta saa sita sya mũthenya kũvika saa kenda, nthĩ ĩsu yonthe nĩyausũie kĩvindu," 
Luke23:45 nĩkwĩthĩwa syũa nĩyaekie kumya kyeni. Kĩtambaa kĩla kyatilanĩtye Ĩkalũ nĩkyatembũkanĩle katĩ. 
Luke23:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakayie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ, “Asa, thayũ wakwa nĩngũwia mokonĩ maku!” Na amina kũneena ũu akw'a." 
Luke23:47 Yĩla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana woonie ũndũ kweekĩka, nĩwamũkathie Ngai na asya atĩĩ, “Kwa w'o, mũndũ ũũ ndeĩ na ĩvĩtyo!”" 
Luke23:48 Andũ onthe ala mookĩte kũsyaĩĩsya, moona ũndũ kweekĩka, nĩmenũkie na kĩĩo kingĩ." 
Luke23:49 Anyanyae ma Yesũ onthe na aka ala mookanĩtye nake kuma Kalilii, nĩmaũngyĩ kũasa masyaĩĩsye maũndũ asu." 
Luke23:50 Vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yosevu kuma Alimathea, nayo nĩ ndũa yĩ Yutia. Aĩ mũndũ mũseo na mũlũngalu na weeteelete kũka kwa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai. O na kau aĩ ũmwe wa atumĩa ma nzama ya Ayuti, ndaaĩtĩkĩlana na ũtw'ĩo woo na ũndũ ũsu meekie." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Nĩwaendie vala ve Vilato na amũkũlya amwĩtĩkĩlye kũthi kũveta mwĩĩ wa Yesũ. 
Luke23:53 Nĩvo ĩndĩ watheeisye mwĩĩ ũsu kuma ngelany'onĩ, aũlinga na kĩtambaa kĩnene na aũthika mbũanĩ yenzĩtwe ĩvianĩ na ĩtaĩ yaathikwa mũndũ." 
Luke23:54 Mũthenya ũsu kwaĩ Wakatano, na mũthenya wa Savato waĩ vakuvĩ kwambĩĩa." 
Luke23:55 Ala aka mookanĩtye na Yesũ kuma Kalilii nĩmaumie Yosevu ĩtina, na moona mbũa ĩsu na ũndũ mwĩĩ wa Yesũ wathikwa vo." 
Luke23:56 Nĩmasyokie mũsyĩ na maseũvya mĩtĩ ĩnyungaa nesa, na mauta me mũuke mũseo. Mũthenyanĩ wa Savato nĩmathũmũie kwĩanana na ũndũ Mĩao yaĩtye." 
Luke24:1 Wakyumwa vaa kũitheatheana, aka nĩmaendie mbũanĩ makuĩte mĩtĩ ĩnyungaa nesa ĩla maseũvĩtye." 
Luke24:2 Nĩmeethĩie ĩvia yĩla yavingĩte mũomonĩ yĩvingilitĩtw'e yĩkauma vau mbũanĩ. 
Luke24:3 Ĩndĩ yĩla malikile nthĩnĩ mayaaĩthĩa mwĩĩ wa Mwĩai Yesũ. 
Luke24:4 Maendee na kũsaanĩw'a nĩ ũndũ ũsu, aũme elĩ mekĩĩte ngũa ikũtisatisa nĩmaũngamie vakuvĩ namo." 
Luke24:5 Aka asu me na w'ĩa mwingĩ nĩmakumanĩie nthĩ, namo aũme asu mamakũlya atĩĩ, “Nĩkĩ mũũmantha mũndũ wĩ thayũ katĩ wa ala akw'ũ?" 
Luke24:6 Nde vaa nũthayũũkie. Kwa lilikanai ũndũ wamũtavisye yĩla waĩ Kalilii: 
Luke24:7 ‘Mwana wa Mũndũ no nginya anenganwe kwa avĩtany'a ambwe, na ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ aithayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Nĩmalilikanile ndeto isu sya Yesũ," 
Luke24:9 na mauma mbũanĩ mathi matavany'a maũndũ asu onthe kwa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na ũmwe na kwa andũ ala angĩ. 
Luke24:10 Aka asu matavisye atũmwa ũvoo ũsu nĩ Meli Makitalene, Yoena, na Meli inyia wa Yakovo o vamwe na aka angĩ maĩ namo." 
Luke24:11 Ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a moosa ndeto isu ta sya mana na malea kũĩkĩĩa aka asu. 
Luke24:12 Ĩndĩ Vetelo ookĩla asemba mbũanĩ. Nĩwakumanie akunĩkĩla nthĩnĩ, na oona ila ngũa sya kũthika mũndũ syĩ syoka. Nĩvo ĩndĩ wasyokie mũsyĩ aseng'etw'e nĩ kĩla kĩthĩwa kĩkĩkie." 
Luke24:13 Mũthenyanĩ o ũsu, amanyĩw'a elĩ ma Yesũ nĩmaendete ndũanĩ yĩtawa Emaũ, yĩ kĩlomita ta ĩkũmi na kĩmwe kuma Yelũsalemu." 
Luke24:14 Maendete makĩea ngewa ĩũlũ wa maũndũ onthe ala maneekĩkie. 
Luke24:15 Maendee na kũea ngewa na ũkũlany'a maũndũ, Yesũ nĩwamathengeeie na aendany'a namo." 
Luke24:16 Nĩmamwonie, ĩndĩ mayaamũmanya." 
Luke24:17 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Nĩ kyaũ kĩĩ mũendete mũkĩea ngewa ĩũlũ wakyo?” Namo maũngama, matukĩtye mothyũ moo." 
Luke24:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũmwe woo ũla weetawa Kĩliovasi wamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Noue mũeni ũla wĩkalaa Yelũsalemu ũtesĩ maũndũ ala mekĩkĩte kũu ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ?”" 
Luke24:19 Nake Yesũ amakũlya, “Nĩ maũndũ maũ?” Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Maũndũ ala maneekĩkie kwa Yesũ ũla wumĩte Nasaleti. Anaĩ mwathani na nũneesĩkĩe nĩ Ngai na andũ ta mũndũ ũnai na ũkũmũ mekonĩ make na ndetonĩ syake." 
Luke24:20 Athembi anene na atongoi maitũ nĩmanamũnenganie atw'ĩĩwa kũawa na ambwa ngelany'onĩ. 
Luke24:21 Ithyĩ tũneekwatasya kana nĩwe wĩetee andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ũthasyo! Na vamwe na ũu, ũũ nĩw'o mũthenya wa katatũ kuma maũndũ asu meethĩwa." 
Luke24:22 Ũndũ ũngĩ, ve aka ma nguthu yaitũ matũseng'isye mũno. Maendie mbũanĩ vaa kũitheatheana," 
Luke24:23 ĩndĩ mainethĩa mwĩĩ wake. Masyokie mayasya nĩmaumĩlĩĩlwa nĩ alaĩka woninĩ mamea kana nũthayũũkie. 
Luke24:24 Amwe ma nguthu yaitũ nĩmaendie mbũanĩ, na meethĩa maũndũ mailyĩ o ũndũ aka meĩwetete, ĩndĩ mainamwona.”" 
Luke24:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ, “Inyw'ĩ ko mũtumanĩte ata, na ko mũĩkĩĩaa na vinya ata maũndũ onthe ala maneenetwe nĩ athani!" 
Luke24:26 Nĩkũlya, ndũnaĩ ũndũ mwaĩlu Klĩsto kũthĩnw'a na ĩndĩ ailika ũkumyonĩ wake?”" 
Luke24:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamaeleisye maũndũ onthe ala mawetetwe ĩũlũ wake nthĩnĩ wa Maandĩko Matheu, kwambĩĩa mavukunĩ ma Mwose kũthi kũvika momanyĩsyo ma athani onthe." 
Luke24:28 Yĩla mathengeeie ndũanĩ ĩla maendete, Yesũ nĩweekie ta ũkũendeea na kyalo," 
Luke24:29 ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu mamwĩsũva maimwĩa atĩĩ, “Ĩkala naitũ nũndũ mũthenya nĩwathela na kĩvindu kĩendee na kwĩkusĩanĩsya.” Kwoou Yesũ ekala namo." 
Luke24:30 Yĩla wekalile nthĩ namo maathĩw'e, nĩwoosie mũkate na atũnga mũvea; nĩwaũtilangile na amanenga." 
Luke24:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ masalukilw'e metho mamũmanya, nake aa maeka kũmwona." 
Luke24:32 Nĩmaneenanisye me elĩ makũlany'a atĩĩ, “Tũinew'a ngoo sitũ syambĩĩa kũvyũva yĩla ũkũneenaa naitũ twĩ nzĩanĩ aitũelesya Maandĩko Matheu?”" 
Luke24:33 Nĩmookĩlile saanĩ o ũsu na masyoka Yelũsalemu, na meethĩa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na ũmwe mombanĩte na andũ ala angĩ maĩ namo," 
Luke24:34 mayasya atĩĩ, “Kwa w'o Mwĩai nũthayũũkie; nũmumĩlĩĩile Simioni!”" 
Luke24:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu elĩ namo mamaeleisye kĩla kĩkĩkie nzĩanĩ, na ũndũ mamũmanyie Yesũ yĩla ũtilangile mũkate." 
Luke24:36 O maendee na kũea ngewa ĩsu, Yesũ mwene nĩwaumĩlile aũngama katĩ woo na amea, “Mũuo nĩwĩthĩwe nenyu!”" 
Luke24:37 Ĩndĩ nĩmatelemile na makwatwa nĩ w'ĩa maisũanĩa nĩ ĩimũ. 
Luke24:38 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Mũtelemetw'e nĩ kyaũ? Nĩkĩ mwĩ na nzika ngoonĩ syenyu?" 
Luke24:39 Kwa sisyai moko makwa na maũũ, na nĩmũũmanya kana kwa w'o Ninyie. Ngwatangei na nĩmũũmanya, nũndũ ĩimũ yĩi mwĩĩ kana mavĩndĩ ũndũ mũũmbona nyie nĩ nasyo.”" 
Luke24:40 Amina kwasya ũu, nĩwamonisye moko make na maũũ make." 
Luke24:41 O maendee kũlea kũĩkĩĩa nĩ mũyo na kũseng'a nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Vaa mwĩ na kĩndũ kĩĩwa?”" 
Luke24:42 Nĩmamũnengie ĩkũyũ ĩkaange," 
Luke24:43 nake oosa aya masyaĩĩsye. 
Luke24:44 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie atĩĩ, “Maũndũ aa nĩmo namũtavasya yĩla naĩ nenyu, kana maũndũ onthe ala maandĩkĩtwe ĩũlũ wakwa mavukunĩ ma Mwose, ma Athani, o vamwe na ma Savulĩ, no nginya meanĩw'e.”" 
Luke24:45 Nĩwaamũkisye ilĩko syoo maelewe nĩ Maandĩko Matheu," 
Luke24:46 na amea atĩĩ, “Ũũ nĩw'o kũandĩkĩtwe: Klĩsto no nginya akw'e, na no nginya athayũũke kuma kwa akw'ũ ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ." 
Luke24:47 O ta ũu no nginya andũ matavw'e ũvoo ĩũlũ wa kwĩlila kwondũ wa naĩ syoo, na kũekewa naĩ ĩsyĩtwanĩ yake kwambĩĩa Yelũsalemu." 
Luke24:48 Inyw'ĩ mwĩ ngũsĩ sya maũndũ aa. 
Luke24:49 Nyie ngamũtũmĩa ũla Ĩthe wakwa wathanie, ĩndĩ ĩkalai vaa mũsyĩnĩ kũvika mũnengwe vinya kuma ĩũlũ.”" 
Luke24:50 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watongoeisye aatĩĩi asu make onthe mauma Yelũsalemu amatwaa Mbethani, na me vau ookĩlya moko make amaathima." 
Luke24:51 Aendee na kũmaathima nĩwoosiwe kuma vala maĩ ambatw'a ĩtunĩ. 
Luke24:52 Nĩmamũthaithie na masyoka Yelũsalemu me na ũtanu mwingĩ. 
Luke24:53 Ĩvinda yonthe mekalaa Ĩkalũnĩ maimũtũngĩa Ngai mũvea. 
John1:1 Mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wa nthĩ Ndeto aĩ kw'o, na Ndeto ũsu aĩ vamwe na Ngai na ũ Ndeto aĩ Ngai." 
John1:2 Ndeto ũsu aĩ kw'o kuma mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ vamwe na Ngai. 
John1:3 Kwĩsĩla kwake syĩndũ syonthe nĩsyoombiwe, na ate vo vai kĩndũ kyaaũmbwa." 
John1:4 Ndeto ũsu nĩwe kĩtina kya thayũ, na thayũ ũsu nĩw'o waetie kyeni kwa andũ onthe." 
John1:5 Kyeni kĩu nĩkĩkenaa kĩvindunĩ na kĩvindu kĩyaakĩkĩlya vinya. 
John1:6 Ngai nĩwatũmie mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yoana," 
John1:7 ũla wookie ta ngũsĩ akũsĩĩe kyeni kĩu, nĩ kana kwĩsĩla kwake andũ onthe matonye kũĩkĩĩa." 
John1:8 We ti we waĩ kyeni kĩu; ookie kũneena ĩũlũ wakyo. 
John1:9 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyaĩ kyeni kya w'o, nakyo nĩ kĩla kyũkaa kũũ nthĩ kĩkamulĩkĩlaa andũ onthe." 
John1:10 Ndeto aĩ kũũ nthĩ, na o na kau Ngai oombie nthĩ kwĩsĩla kwake, nthĩ ndyaamũmanya." 
John1:11 Ookie nthĩ ĩla yake mwene, ĩndĩ andũ ala make mayaamũthokya." 
John1:12 Ĩndĩ onthe ala mamũthokisye, ala mamũĩkĩĩie, nĩwamanengie ũkũmũ wa kũtw'ĩka syana sya Ngai." 
John1:13 Mayaatw'ĩka syana sya Ngai kwa nzĩa ya kũsyawa, kana kwa ũtonyi wa mwĩĩ, kana kwendanĩ kwa mũndũ, ĩndĩ matw'ĩkĩthiw'e nĩ Ngai mwene." 
John1:14 Nake Ndeto nĩwatw'ĩkie mũndũ na atũa naitũ, ausũĩtwe nĩ mumo na ũla w'o. Ithyĩ nĩtwoonie ũkumyo wake, ũkumyo ũla wakwatie ta we Mwana wa Asa e ũmwe." 
John1:15 Yoana nĩwakũsĩĩie ĩũlũ wake na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ, “Ũũ nĩwe naneenaa ĩũlũ wake yĩla naisye, ‘Ũla wũkĩte ĩtina wakwa nĩ mũnene kwĩ inyie, nũndũ aĩ kw'o o na nde mũsyae.’ ”" 
John1:16 Kuma wusũunĩ wa mumo wake, ithyonthe nĩtũkwatĩte mumo mwingĩ." 
John1:17 Nũndũ Mĩao yanenganiwe kwĩsĩla kwa Mwose, ĩndĩ mumo na ũla ũw'o syatũvikĩie kwĩsĩla kwa Yesũ Klĩsto." 
John1:18 Vai mũndũ waamwona Ngai, ĩndĩ Mwana wake e ũmwe ũla wĩkalaa vakuvĩ na Asa, nũtwonetye ũndũ Asa ũilyĩ." 
John1:19 Ũũ nĩw'o ũkũsĩ ũla Yoana Mũvatisi waumisye, yĩla atongoi ma Ayuti matũmie athembi na Alivai kuma Yelũsalemu mathi makamũkũlye atĩĩ, “We nue ũũ?”" 
John1:20 Yoana Nĩwamatavisye ateũmavitha amea atĩĩ, “Nyie ti inyie Klĩsto. ”" 
John1:21 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Na yu nue ũũ? Nue Eliya?” Nake amea, “Aiee, ti inyie Eliya.” Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Na nue ũla Mwathani?” Nake amea, “Aiee.”" 
John1:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Kwoou nue ũũ? No nginya ũtũnenge ũsũngĩo tũtũngĩe ala matũtũmie. Wĩasya ata ĩũlũ waku?”" 
John1:23 Yoana nĩwamasũngĩie na ndeto sya mwathani Ĩsaia amea: “Nyie nĩ o mũndũ ũkũneena na wasya mũnene e weũnĩ ayasya, ‘Lũngalyai nzĩa ĩla Mwĩai wĩĩsĩla.’ ”" 
John1:24 Namo andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩ Avalisi 
John1:25 mamũkũlya Yoana atĩĩ, “Wĩvatisa nĩkĩ ĩndĩ, ethĩwa tuue Klĩsto kana Eliya kana ũla Mwathani?”" 
John1:26 Yoana amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ, “Nyie nĩvatisaa na kĩw'ũ, ĩndĩ ve mũndũ ũũngyĩ katĩ wenyu mũtamwĩsĩ." 
John1:27 Ũsu nĩwe wũkĩte ĩtina wakwa, ũla o na mĩkwa ya iatũ syake nyie ndaĩlĩtwe nĩ kũmĩthasya.”" 
John1:28 Maũndũ asu onthe meekĩkie Mbethani, ĩla yĩ ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa wa Ũsĩ wa Yolotani vala Yoana wavatisĩaa andũ." 
John1:29 Ũnĩ ũsu Yoana nĩwamwonie Yesũ okĩte vala ũĩ na asya atĩĩ, “Kwa sisyai, ũya nĩwe Kalondu ka Ngai, ũla ũvetaa naĩ sya nthĩ." 
John1:30 Ũũ nĩwe ũla naneenaa ĩũlũ wake yĩla naasya, ‘Ũla wũkĩte ĩtina wakwa nĩ mũnene kwĩ inyie, nũndũ aĩ kw'o o na nde mũsyae.’" 
John1:31 Nyie mwene ndyamwĩsĩ, ĩndĩ kĩtumi kyakwa kya kũka kũvatisa na kĩw'ũ, kyaĩ nĩ kana atonye kũmanyĩka nĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli.”" 
John1:32 Yoana nĩwakũsĩĩie asya atĩĩ, “Nyie nĩnoonie Veva atheea ta ĩvũĩ kuma ĩtunĩ amũvũĩla." 
John1:33 Nyie ndyeesĩ nĩwe ũũ, ĩndĩ ũla wandũmĩte nũke kũvatisa na kĩw'ũ ambĩĩte: ‘Mũndũ ũla wĩona Veva amũtheea amũvũĩle, ũsu nĩwe ũvatisaa na Veva Mũtheu.’" 
John1:34 Nyie nĩnoonie ũndũ ũsu ũyĩkĩka, na nĩngũkũsĩĩa ki kana ũũ nĩwe Mwana wa Ngai.”" 
John1:35 Mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe, Yoana nĩwaũngeme vala vandũ e na elĩ ma amanyĩw'a make." 
John1:36 Nĩwoonie Yesũ avĩtĩte na amea atĩĩ, “Kwa sisyai, ũya nĩwe Kalondu ka Ngai!”" 
John1:37 Amanyĩw'a asu elĩ nĩmeewie kĩla Yoana waweta na mamũatĩĩa Yesũ. 
John1:38 Yesũ nĩwavĩndũkie amona mamumĩte ĩtina na amakũlya atĩĩ, “Mwĩmantha kyaũ?” Namo mamwĩa, “Lavai,” (Ũalyũlo wayo nĩ Mũmanyĩsya) “We wĩkalaa va?”" 
John1:39 Yesũ amea atĩĩ, “Ũkai mũkavone.” Nĩmaendanisye nake moona vala wekalaa, na mekala nake mũthenya ũsu; syaĩ ta saa kũmi sya mũthenya." 
John1:40 Endelea mwana-a-inyia wa Simioni Vetelo, aĩ ũmwe wa amanyĩw'a asu elĩ ala meew'ĩte kĩla Yoana wawetie na mamũatĩĩa Yesũ." 
John1:41 Ũndũ wa mbee ũla Endelea weekie waĩ kũmantha mwana-a-inyia Simioni na kũmwĩa atĩĩ, “Nĩtũmwonie Masia, ũla nĩ Klĩsto.”" 
John1:42 Nĩvo ĩndĩ watwaie Simioni vala ve Yesũ. Yesũ nĩwamũsyaisye na amwĩa atĩĩ, “We wĩtawa Simioni mwana wa Yoana ĩndĩ ũkeetawa Keva” (Kwa Kĩkiliki nĩ Vetelo, na ũalyũlo wayo nĩ ĩvia)." 
John1:43 Mũthenya ũsu ũngĩ waatĩĩe Yesũ nĩwavangie kũthi Kalilii. Kũu nĩweethĩie Vilivũ na amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ngatĩĩa.”" 
John1:44 Vilivũ aĩ wa kuma Mbethisaita, nayo nĩ ndũa ĩla Endelea na Vetelo matwĩe." 
John1:45 Vilivũ nĩwoonie Nathanieli na amwĩa atĩĩ, “Nĩtũmwonie ũla Mwose waandĩkie ĩũlũ wake ĩvukunĩ ya Mĩao, na ũla athani o ta ũu maandĩkie ĩũlũ wake, nake nĩ Yesũ mwana wa Yosevu kuma Nasaleti.”" 
John1:46 Nake Nathanieli amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Ve kĩndũ kĩseo kĩtonya kuma Nasaleti?” Vilivũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ũka ũkeyonee.”" 
John1:47 Yesũ nĩwoonie Nathanieli okĩte vala ũĩ na aneena ĩũlũ wake asya atĩĩ, “Kwa sisyai Mũĩsilaeli wa w'o, na ũtaweteka ũthũku.”" 
John1:48 Nathanieli amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Ũmbĩsĩ ata?” Yesũ amwĩa, “Ngwonie yĩla wĩĩ ungu wa mũkũyũ Vilivũ atanamba kũkwĩta.”" 
John1:49 Nathanieli amwĩa, “Mũmanyĩsya we wĩ Mwana wa Ngai! Nue Mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli!”" 
John1:50 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Waĩkĩĩa nũndũ nakwĩa ngwonie wĩ ungu wa mũkũyũ? Ũkoona maũndũ manene kwĩ asu.”" 
John1:51 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waisye atĩĩ, “Nĩmũtavya w'o, mũkoona ĩtu yĩ ĩvingũe na alaĩka ma Ngai mayambata na makĩmũtheea Mwana wa Mũndũ.”" 
John2:1 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩlĩ, kwaĩ mũtwaano ndũanĩ yĩtawa Kena nthĩ ya Kalilii, na Inyia wa Yesũ aĩ vo." 
John2:2 Yesũ vamwe na amanyĩw'a make o namo nĩmathoketw'e mũtwaanonĩ ũsu. 
John2:3 Yĩla ndivai yathelile, inyia wa Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ, “Nĩmathelelwa nĩ ndivai.”" 
John2:4 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Mwaitũ, wĩnthĩnĩsya kĩ ũndũnĩ ũũ? Saa wakwa ndũnamba kũvika.”" 
John2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ inyia wa Yesũ wameie andũ ala mathũkũmaa atĩĩ, “Ũndũ ũla ũkũmwĩa mwĩke, wĩkei.”" 
John2:6 Vau vaĩ mbisũ thanthatũ sya mavia syatw'ĩĩkanĩtw'e vo, na kĩla ĩmwe yaĩ ĩtonya kũlika maleve elĩ kana atatũ ma kĩw'ũ. Mbisũ isu syaiĩtwe vau kwondũ wa vata wa Ayuti wa kwĩthesya kwĩanana na kĩthĩo kyoo." 
John2:7 Yesũ nĩweeie ala athũkũmi atĩĩ, “Usũsyai mbisũ ĩsu na kĩw'ũ.” Namo mautĩĩa kĩw'ũ syausũa ki." 
John2:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie atĩĩ, “Tavai kĩmwe yu mũtwaĩe mũũngamĩi wa kyathĩ.” Nĩmeekie ũu," 
John2:9 nake mũũngamĩi wa kyathĩ asama kĩla kĩw'ũ kĩalyũlĩtwe kĩkatw'ĩka ndivai. Ndaamanya vala yauma (no ala athũkũmi mautĩte kĩw'ũ meesĩ), na kwoou athi amwĩta mũtwaani," 
John2:10 amwĩa atĩĩ, “Andũ onthe maumaalasya ndivai ĩla nzeo mbee, na aeni manyw'a mũno ayumaalya ĩndĩ ndivai ĩla ĩte nzeo mũno, ĩndĩ we wiie ndivai ĩla nzeo wĩse kũmyumaalya yu.”" 
John2:11 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyama kya mbee kĩla Yesũ weekie, na akĩkie ndũanĩ ya Kena nthĩ ya Kalilii; vau nĩwoonanisye ũkumyo wake na amanyĩw'a make mamũĩkĩĩa." 
John2:12 Ĩtina wa ũu, Yesũ nĩwatheeie Kavelinaũmu e na inyia wake, ana-a-inyia make, amanyĩw'a make, na mekala kw'o matukũ mavũthũ." 
John2:13 Ĩvinda ya mboka ya Ayuti ya Vasaka nĩyathengeeie, na kwoou Yesũ athi Yelũsalemu." 
John2:14 Kũu Ĩkalũnĩ nĩweethĩie andũ maithoosya ng'ombe, malondu na ndumbũ, na angĩ ala mavunzasya mbesa mailyĩ nthĩ." 
John2:15 Nĩwaseũvisye mũsalisa wa ndii na amalũngya onthe kuma Ĩkalũnĩ, vamwe na ng'ombe na malondu moo. O ta ũu, nĩwavalaanilye mbesa sya ala mavunzasya na ang'uthũlanga mesa syoo." 
John2:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeie andũ ala mathooasya ndumbũ atĩĩ, “Vetangai syĩndũ ii vaa; mũtonya ata kũtw'ĩkĩthya nyũmba ya Asa wakwa ndũnyũ?”" 
John2:17 Amanyĩw'a make nĩmalilikanile kana nĩkũandĩkĩtwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu: “Wendo wakwa kwa nyũmba yaku nũũndya.” 
John2:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atongoi ma Ayuti mamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ, “Wĩĩka kyama kĩva kya kũtwony'a kana wĩ na ũkũmũ wa kwĩka ũndũ ũũ?”" 
John2:19 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Anangai Ĩkalũ yĩĩ na ngayaka ĩngĩ na mĩthenya ĩtatũ.”" 
John2:20 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Ĩkalũ yĩĩ yaakiwe vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩna na thanthatũ, we nũkũyaka na mĩthenya ĩtatũ?”" 
John2:21 Ĩndĩ ĩkalũ yĩla Yesũ waneenaa ĩũlũ wayo nĩ mwĩĩ wake. 
John2:22 Kwoou yĩla wathayũũkie kuma kwa akw'ũ, amanyĩw'a make nĩmalilikanile kana nĩwawetete ũndũ ũsu, na maĩkĩĩa kĩla kyaandĩkĩtwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu na ila ndeto Yesũ waneenete." 
John2:23 Yesũ e Yelũsalemu ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Vasaka, andũ aingĩ nĩmamũĩkĩĩie nũndũ wa kwona syama ila weekaa." 
John2:24 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaameyĩelela, nũndũ nĩweesĩ andũ." 
John2:25 Ndaĩ na vata wa kũtavw'a nĩ mũndũ ĩũlũ wa andũ, nũndũ we mwene nĩweesĩ kĩla kĩ ngoonĩ sya andũ." 
John3:1 Vaĩ mũtongoi ũmwe wa Ayuti na waĩ wa nguthu ya Avalisi weetawa Nikotemo. 
John3:2 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩwaendie kwa Yesũ ũtukũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Lavai, nĩtwĩsĩ kana wĩ mũmanyĩsya ũtũmĩtwe kuma kwa Ngai, nũndũ vai mũndũ ũtonya kwĩka syama ila ũkwĩka Ngai ate vamwe nake.”" 
John3:3 Yesũ amũsũngĩa, “Nĩkũtavya w'o, vai mũndũ ũtonya kwona ũsumbĩ wa Ngai atasyaĩtwe ĩngĩ.”" 
John3:4 Nikotemo amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Mũndũ mũima atonya kũsyawa ĩngĩ ata? Kwa w'o nũtonya kũlika ĩvunĩ kwa inyia akasyawa ya kelĩ?”" 
John3:5 Yesũ amũsũngĩa atĩĩ, “Nĩkũtavya w'o, mũndũ atasyaĩtwe na kĩw'ũ na Veva, ndatonya kũlika ũsumbĩnĩ wa Ngai." 
John3:6 Mũndũ asyaawa kĩ-mwĩĩ nĩ asyai, ĩndĩ asyaawa kĩ-veva nĩ Veva." 
John3:7 Ndũkaseng'e nũndũ nakwĩa, ‘No nginya ũsyawe ĩngĩ.’" 
John3:8 Kĩseve nĩkĩuutanaa kĩendete ngalĩko ĩla kĩkwenda. Nĩwĩw'aa wasya wakyo, ĩndĩ ndũmanyaa kũla kyumĩte kana kũla kĩendete. Ũu now'o kũilyĩ kwa kĩla mũndũ ũsyaawa nĩ Veva.”" 
John3:9 Nikotemo amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Ũndũ ũsu ũtonyeka ata?”" 
John3:10 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa, “We wĩ mũmanyĩsya mũnene nthĩnĩ wa Ĩsilaeli, ũtonya ata kwĩthĩwa ũtekũelewa nĩ maũndũ aa?" 
John3:11 Nĩkũtavya w'o, ithyĩ tũneenaa kĩla twĩsĩ, na kũkũsĩĩa kĩla twonete, ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ mũyĩtĩkĩlaa kĩla twamũtavya." 
John3:12 Ethĩwa namũtavya maũndũ ma kũũ nthĩ na mwalea kũĩkĩĩa, mũkaĩkĩĩa ata namũtavya maũndũ ma ĩtunĩ?" 
John3:13 Vai mũndũ waathi ĩtunĩ ate o ũla watheeie kuma ĩtunĩ, nake nĩ Mwana wa Mũndũ." 
John3:14 O tondũ Mwose wookĩlilye nzoka ya kyũma weũnĩ, o nake Mwana wa Mũndũ nũkokĩlw'a oou," 
John3:15 nĩ kana o ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa atonye kwĩthĩwa na thayũ ũtathela. 
John3:16 “Nũndũ Ngai nĩwendete nthĩ mũno, nĩwanenganie Mwana wake e ũmwe, nĩ kana o ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa ndakakw'e ĩndĩ ethĩwe na thayũ ũtathela." 
John3:17 Ngai ndaatũma Mwana wake kũũ nthĩ oke kũmĩsilĩla, ĩndĩ nĩ kana atw'ĩke Mũtangĩĩi wayo." 
John3:18 “Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Mwana wa Ngai ti mũsilĩle, ĩndĩ ũla ũtamũĩkĩaa nũminĩte kũsilĩlwa nũndũ nũleete kũĩkĩĩa ĩsyĩtwa ya Mwana wa Ngai e ũmwe." 
John3:19 Ũsilĩlo wũkaa nũndũ wa ũndũ ũũ: Kyeni nĩkyookie kũũ nthĩ, ĩndĩ andũ menda kĩvindu vandũ va kyeni, nĩkwĩthĩwa meko moo nĩ mathũku." 
John3:20 Andũ onthe ala mekaa ũla ũthũku nĩmamenete kyeni, na kwoou mayũkaa kyeninĩ nĩ kana meko moo maikese kumbũanw'a." 
John3:21 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũatĩĩaa ũw'o nĩwumĩlaa kyeninĩ, nĩ kana meko make moneke kwa w'o kana mekĩtwe kwĩanana na kwenda kwa Ngai.”" 
John3:22 Ĩtina wa ũu Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendie nthĩ ya Yutia, na ekala kũu e namo vandũ va kavinda akĩvatisa andũ." 
John3:23 Yoana o nake nĩwavatisĩaa andũ vandũ vetawa Aenoni vakuvĩ na Salimũ, nũndũ vau vaĩ kĩw'ũ kingĩ na andũ nĩmatindĩaa kũka makavatiswa." 
John3:24 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yoana ndaĩ anamba kũvingĩwa yela. 
John3:25 Ngananĩo nĩyookĩlile katĩ wa amanyĩw'a ma Yoana na Mũyuti mũna, ĩũlũ wa kĩthĩo kya Ayuti kya kwĩthesya." 
John3:26 Kwoou nĩmaendie vala ve Yoana mamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, nũũlilikana ũla mũndũ mwaĩ ĩmwe ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa ya Yolotani, na watavasya andũ ĩũlũ wake? Yu o nake nũkũvatisa na andũ onthe methi vala ũĩ!”" 
John3:27 Yoana nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ, “Vai mũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa na kĩndũ atanengetwe nĩ Ngai." 
John3:28 Inyw'ĩ mwĩ ngũsĩ kana nĩnaisye: ‘Nyie ti inyie Klĩsto, ĩndĩ nĩtũmĩtwe nĩthi mbee wake.’" 
John3:29 Mũtwawa ethĩawa e wa mũtwaani, ĩndĩ mũnyanyae wa mũtwaani aũngamaa vakuvĩ na kwĩthukĩĩsya, na nũtanaa eew'a wasya wa mũtwaani. Ũtanu ũsu nĩw'o wakwa, nayu nĩweanĩa." 
John3:30 No nginya nguma ya Yesũ ĩendee kwongeleka na yakwa ĩiendeea kũnyiva.” 
John3:31 Ũla wũkĩte kuma ĩũlũ nĩ mũnene kwĩ andũ onthe, nake ũla wumaa kũũ nthĩ nĩ wa nthĩ na aneenaa maũndũ ma nthĩ. Ĩndĩ ũla wũkĩte kuma ĩtunĩ nĩ mũnene kwĩ andũ onthe." 
John3:32 Atavasya andũ kĩla we mwene wonete na wĩw'ĩte, ĩndĩ vai mũndũ wĩtĩkĩlaa ndeto syake." 
John3:33 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũsyĩtĩkĩlĩte nĩwũĩkĩĩthĩtye kwa nzĩa ĩsu kana kĩla Ngai ũneenete nĩ kya w'o. 
John3:34 Mũndũ ũla ũtũmĩtwe nĩ Ngai aneenaa ndeto sya Ngai, nũndũ Ngai amũnengae Veva wake vate kĩthimo." 
John3:35 Asa nĩwendete Mwana wake na amũnengete maũndũ onthe. 
John3:36 Mũndũ ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Mwana e na thayũ ũtathela, nake ũla ũtamwĩw'aa Mwana ndakakwata thayũ ũtathela, ĩndĩ akatũaa ũsilĩlonĩ wa Ngai." 
John4:1 Mwĩai nĩwamanyie kana Avalisi nĩmew'ĩte kana aendee kũkwata amanyĩw'a aingĩ kũte Yoana na kũmavatisa," 
John4:2 o na kau ti we wavatisaa ĩndĩ nĩ amanyĩw'a make. 
John4:3 Kwoou Yesũ nĩwaumie kũu Yutia asyoka o ĩngĩ Kalilii. 
John4:4 Akĩthi kw'o aĩ esĩle Samalia. 
John4:5 Kũu Samalia nĩwavikie ndũanĩ yĩtawa Saikale, nayo yĩ vakuvĩ na mũũnda ũla Yakovo wanengete Yosevu mwana wake." 
John4:6 Kĩthima kya Yakovo kyaĩ vau, na kwoou nũndũ Yesũ nĩwanoetw'e mũno nĩ kyalo kĩasa kĩla waendete, nĩwaendie ekala nthĩ ũtee wa kĩthima kĩu. Kwaĩ ta saa sita sya mũthenya." 
John4:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩveti kĩmwe kya kũu Samalia kyookie kũtava kĩw'ũ. Yesũ nĩwakĩie atĩĩ, “Ndavĩle kĩw'ũ nĩnyw'e.”" 
John4:8 Amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ maĩ manathi ndũanĩ kũthooa lĩu. 
John4:9 Kĩveti kĩu Kĩmũsamalia nĩkyamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “We na wĩ Mũyuti nakwa nĩ Mũsamalia, ũtonya ata kũmbĩa nĩkũtavĩle kĩw'ũ?” Ayuti na Asamalia mayatũmĩanĩaa syĩndũ." 
John4:10 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa, “Kethĩwa nũmanya mũthĩnzĩo ũla Ngai ũnenganae, na nũũ ũla ũkũkwĩtya kĩw'ũ anyw'e, we wĩthĩwa wamwĩtya kĩw'ũ, nake ethĩwa akũnenga kĩw'ũ kĩetae thayũ.”" 
John4:11 Kĩveti kĩu kyamũkũlya atĩĩ, “Mũnene, yu na ndwĩ na kĩndũ kya kũtava kĩw'ũ nakyo, na kĩthima now'o kĩlikĩte, wĩumya kĩw'ũ kĩu kĩetae thayũ va?" 
John4:12 Nue mũnene kwĩ ĩthe waitũ Yakovo, ũla watũnengie kĩthima kĩĩ, nawe mwene nokyo wanyusaa vamwe na syana na indo syake?”" 
John4:13 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa, “Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũnyusaa kĩw'ũ kĩĩ akeew'a waũni ĩngĩ," 
John4:14 ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩnyw'a kĩw'ũ kĩla nĩmũnenga, ndakew'a waũni ĩngĩ o na vanini. Kwa w'o kĩkatw'ĩka nthongo nthĩnĩ wake, ĩkũvulutya ĩmũnenge kĩw'ũ kĩla kĩetae thayũ ũtathela.”" 
John4:15 Kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ, “Mũnene, nenge kĩw'ũ kĩu nĩ kana ndikaaĩw'e waũni ĩngĩ, kana kũtindaa ndyũka vaa kũtava kĩw'ũ.”" 
John4:16 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa, “Enda ũkete mũemeu wũke nake vaa.”" 
John4:17 Nakyo kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ, “Nyie ndi mũũme.” Yesũ akĩa, “Waneena w'o kwasya ndwĩ mũũme." 
John4:18 Kwa w'o ũtwaĩtwe nĩ aũme makavika atano, na o na mũndũ ũla wĩ nake yu ti mũemeu. Kwoou kĩu waneena nĩ kya w'o.”" 
John4:19 Kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ, “Mũnene, nĩngwona wĩ mwathani." 
John4:20 Aaũmae maitũ mathaithĩaa kĩĩmanĩ kĩĩ, ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ Ayuti mwaasya kana Yelũsalemu nĩvo vandũ vala andũ maĩlĩte kũthaithĩa.”" 
John4:21 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa akĩa atĩĩ, “Ndĩkĩĩe kĩveti, ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla mũtakathaithĩa Asa kĩĩmanĩ kĩĩ kana Yelũsalemu." 
John4:22 Inyw'ĩ Asamalia mũthaithaa kĩla mũtesĩ; ithyĩ nĩtwĩsĩ kĩla tũthaithaa nũndũ ũtangĩĩo wumaa kwa Ayuti. 
John4:23 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte, o na yu nĩ ĩviku, yĩla athaithi ala maw'o makathaithaa Asa nthĩnĩ wa Veva na nthĩnĩ wa w'o, nũndũ athaithi ma mũthemba ũsu nĩmo Asa wendaa mamũthaithae." 
John4:24 Ngai nĩ Veva na kwoou ala mamũthaithaa no nginya mamũthaithae nthĩnĩ wa Veva na nthĩnĩ wa w'o.” 
John4:25 Kĩveti kĩu kyeea Yesũ atĩĩ, “Nĩnĩsĩ kana Masia ũla nĩ Klĩsto akooka; yĩla wĩũka, akatũtavya maũndũ onthe.”" 
John4:26 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa, “Nyie ngũneena naku ninyie we.”" 
John4:27 Saanĩ ũsu amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ nĩmasyokie kuma ndũanĩ, na maseng'a mũno mamwĩthĩa aineena na kĩveti. Ĩndĩ vai ũmwe waakũlya, “Wĩenda kyaũ?” Kana akamũkũlya, “Wĩneenaa nakyo nĩkĩ?”" 
John4:28 Kĩveti kĩu nĩkyatiie mũtũngi wakyo kyasyoka ndũanĩ na kyatavya andũ kyamea atĩĩ," 
John4:29 “Ũkai mũkone mũndũ wandavya maũndũ onthe ala naaĩka. Nokwĩthĩwa mũndũ ũsu nowe Klĩsto?” 
John4:30 Andũ nĩmaumie ndũanĩ mathi vala ve Yesũ. 
John4:31 Maũndũ asu maendee, amanyĩw'a nĩmamwĩsũvaa Yesũ makĩmwĩa atĩĩ, “Mũmanyĩsya, ya lĩu.”" 
John4:32 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea, “Nĩna lĩu wa kũya inyw'ĩ mũtawĩsĩ.”" 
John4:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make mambĩĩie kũkũlany'a atĩĩ, “Nokwĩthĩwa ve mũndũ wamũetee lĩu?”" 
John4:34 Yesũ amea, “Lĩu wakwa nĩ kwĩka kwenda kwa ũla wandũmie, na kũminũkĩlya wĩa ũla ũnengete." 
John4:35 Inyw'ĩ mũineenaa mũkasya, ‘No myei ĩna ĩtialĩte na tũilika ngethanĩ?’ Ĩndĩ nyie nĩmwĩa kwa sisyai mĩũnda mwone! Lĩu nũvikĩe ĩvinda yaw'o ya kũkethwa na nĩwaĩlĩte kũkethwa." 
John4:36 “Mũkethi nũendeeaa na kũĩvwa na ayũmbany'a ngetha kwondũ wa thayũ ũtathela. Kwoou mũvandi na mũkethi makatana ĩmwe. 
John4:37 Kwondũ wa ũu ũneeni ũũ nĩ wa w'o: ‘Ũmwe nũvandaa na ũngĩ aiketha.’ 
John4:38 Nĩmũtũma mũkakethe ngetha mũtaathũkũmĩa; andũ angĩ nĩmo matethisye wĩa, nenyu mwĩketha ũsyao wa yuutĩa yoo.”" 
John4:39 Asamalia aingĩ ma ndũa ĩsu nĩmookie vala ve Yesũ nũndũ wa kĩla mataviw'e nĩ kĩla kĩveti kana, “Andavya maũndũ onthe ala naaĩka.”" 
John4:40 Kwoou yĩla Asamalia asu mookie vala ve Yesũ, nĩmamũkũlilye ekale namo, nake ekala namo vandũ va mĩthenya ĩlĩ." 
John4:41 Asamalia angĩ aingĩ nĩmamũĩkĩĩie Yesũ kwondũ wa ndeto syake," 
John4:42 na meea kĩla kĩveti atĩĩ, “Yu nĩtwaĩkĩĩa, na ti ũndũ wa ndeto syaku syoka, ĩndĩ nũndũ nĩtweeyĩw'ĩa na nĩtwamanya nesa ki kana ũũ nĩwe Mũtangĩĩi wa nthĩ.”" 
John4:43 Ĩtina wa kwĩkala mĩthenya ĩlĩ Samalia, Yesũ nĩwaumie kũu athi Kalilii." 
John4:44 Yesũ mwene nĩwaĩtye: “Mwathani ndanengetwe ndaĩa nthĩ ĩla wumĩte.” 
John4:45 Yĩla wavikie Kalilii andũ ma kũu nĩmamũthokisye nesa, nũndũ nĩmoonete maũndũ onthe ala weekĩte Yelũsalemu ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Vasaka, nũndũ o namo maĩ kw'o mbokanĩ ĩsu." 
John4:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie o ĩngĩ ndũanĩ ya Kena nthĩ ya Kalilii, vala waalyũlĩte kĩw'ũ kĩkatw'ĩka ndivai. Kavelinaũmu kwaĩ mũnene ũmwe wa silikalĩ kamwana kake kaĩ kawau mũno." 
John4:47 Yĩla weewie kana Yesũ nĩwũkie Kalilii kuma Yutia, nĩwookie vala ũĩ na amwĩsũva athi kũu akamũvoesye kamwana kake kala kaĩ vakuvĩ kũkw'a." 
John4:48 Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ, “Mũtonete syama na maũndũ ma kũseng'ya inyw'ĩ mũitonya kũĩkĩĩa!”" 
John4:49 Mũnene ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ, “Mũnene, ũka tũthi mwana wakwa atanakw'a.”" 
John4:50 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Enda mwana waku nũkũvoa.” Mũndũ ũsu nĩwaĩkĩĩie ndeto sya Yesũ na kwoou athi." 
John4:51 E nzĩanĩ enũkĩte, athũkũmi make nĩmamũkomanie mamwĩa atĩĩ, “Kavĩsĩ kaku nĩkavoie.”" 
John4:52 Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ, “Kambĩĩie kũkwata kavaa ĩndĩĩ?” Namo mamwĩa, “Ĩyoo saa mũonza sya mũthenya nĩw'o ndetema ĩsu ĩnaumie mwĩĩ.”" 
John4:53 Ĩthe wa kamwana kau nĩwalilikanile kana saa isu nosyo Yesũ ũnamwĩie atĩĩ, “Mwana waku nũkũvoa,” na kwoou we na mũsyĩ wake maĩkĩĩa Yesũ." 
John4:54 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyama kya kelĩ kĩla Yesũ weekie ooka Kalilii kuma Yutia. 
John5:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu, Yesũ nĩwaendie Yelũsalemu kwondũ wa mboka yaĩ kw'o ya Ayuti." 
John5:2 Kũu Yelũsalemu vakuvĩ na mũvĩa wĩtawa Mũvĩa wa Malondu, vaĩ ndia ya kĩw'ũ yeetawa kwa Kĩevelania Mbethisatha, na ũtee wayo kwaĩ kũndũ kũtano kwakitĩtwe kwa kwĩkala." 
John5:3 Kũndũnĩ kũu kwakomangaa andũ aingĩ mũno awau na ilalinda, andũ maĩ na maũũ mathũku, na andũ maĩ na mamutha monzu. [Andũ asu meethĩawa meteelete kĩw'ũ kĩkwaithangw'e," 
John5:4 nũndũ mũlaĩka wa Ngai nĩwatheeaa mavinda amwe akalika ndianĩ ĩsu akamĩkwaithangya. Mũwau ũla walikaa ndianĩ ĩsu mbee, kĩw'ũ kyakwaithangw'a nĩwavoaa ũwau ũla eĩ naw'o.]" 
John5:5 Vau vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wekalĩte e mũwau vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na nyanya. 
John5:6 Yĩla Yesũ woonie mũndũ ũsu na amanya kana atwĩe akomete vau vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Nũkwenda kũvow'a?”" 
John5:7 Mũndũ ũsu amũsũngĩa, “Mũnene, nyie ndi na mũndũ wa kũndikya ndianĩ yĩla kĩw'ũ kyakwaithangw'a, na ngilasya ngyenda kũlika mũndũ ũngĩ ailika mbee wakwa.”" 
John5:8 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ, “Ũkĩla! Kua mũkeka waku na ũithi.”" 
John5:9 O vau kwa vau, mũndũ ũsu nĩwavoie na akua mũkeka wake athi. Mũthenya ũla maũndũ asu meekĩkaa waĩ wa Savato." 
John5:10 Kwoou atongoi ma Ayuti meea mũndũ ũsu wavoiw'e atĩĩ, “Ũmũnthĩ nĩ mũthenya wa Savato, na mĩao ndĩũkwĩtĩkĩlya ũkue mũkeka waku.”" 
John5:11 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu amea atĩĩ, “Mũndũ ũla wambosya ambĩa, ‘Kua mũkeka waku na ũithi.’ ”" 
John5:12 Namo mamũkũlya, “Mũndũ ũsu wakwĩa, ‘Kua mũkeka waku na ũithi nũũ?’ ”" 
John5:13 Mũndũ ũsu wavoiw'e ndeesĩ mũndũ ũsu wamũvosya, nũndũ Yesũ aĩ anauma vau akalikana na ĩkomano ya andũ yĩla yaĩ vau." 
John5:14 Masaa angĩ, Yesũ nĩweethĩie mũndũ ũsu Ĩkalũnĩ na amwĩa atĩĩ, “Nũkwona nũvoie; ndũkatate kwĩka naĩ ĩngĩ ndũkakwatwe nĩ ũndũ ũngĩ mũthũku mbee wa ũsu.”" 
John5:15 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwaendie atavya atongoi ma Ayuti kana Yesũ nĩwe ũmũvoisye. 
John5:16 Kwoou Ayuti nĩmambĩĩie kũmũthĩny'a Yesũ, nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa eekie ũndũ ũsu mũthenyanĩ wa Savato." 
John5:17 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ, “Ĩthe wakwa o nayu nũkũtethya wĩa, nakwa o ta ũu nĩngũtethya wĩa.”" 
John5:18 Ũneeni ũsu wa Yesũ nĩwatumie atongoi ma Ayuti mathũkĩĩa mũno mayenda kũmũaa, tyo kwondũ wa kũtũla mwĩao wa mũthenya wa Savato, ĩndĩ o ta ũu kwondũ wa kwĩta Ngai Ĩthe wake, na kwa nzĩa ĩsu eeyĩanany'a na Ngai." 
John5:19 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ, “Nĩmũtavya w'o, Mwana ndatonya kwĩka ũndũ wake mwene ate o ũla woona Ĩthe ayĩka, nũndũ kĩla Ĩthe wĩkaa nokyo Mwana o nake wĩkaa." 
John5:20 Asa nũmwendete Mwana na nũmwonasya maũndũ onthe ala we mwene wĩkaa, na akamwony'a maũndũ manene kwĩ aa o nenyu mũseng'e." 
John5:21 O ũndũ Asa ũthayũũkasya andũ ala akw'ũ na kũmanenga thayũ, now'o o nake Mwana ũnengae thayũ andũ ala ũkwenda." 
John5:22 Asa nde mũndũ ũsilĩlaa; wĩa wa kũsilĩla w'onthe amũnengete Mwana," 
John5:23 nĩ kana andũ onthe matonye kũmũnenga Mwana ndaĩa, o ũndũ manengete Asa ndaĩa. Mũndũ ũla ũtanengae Mwana ndaĩa ndanengae Asa ũla ũmũtũmĩte ndaĩa." 
John5:24 “Nĩmũtavya w'o, kĩla ũmwe ũla wĩw'aa ndeto syakwa, na ũĩkĩĩaa ũla wandũmie e na thayũ ũtathela. Ndakasilĩlwa, ĩndĩ nũminĩte kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ akalika thayũnĩ." 
John5:25 Nĩmũtavya w'o, ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte o na yu nĩ ĩviku, yĩla akw'ũ makew'a wasya wa Mwana wa Ngai, namo ala makawĩw'a makeethĩwa thayũ." 
John5:26 O ũndũ Asa mwene nĩwe kĩtina kya thayũ, now'o wamũtwie Mwana wake ethĩwe kĩtina kya thayũ." 
John5:27 O ta ũu nĩwamũnengie ũkũmũ wa kũsilĩla andũ, nũndũ we nĩ Mwana wa Mũndũ." 
John5:28 Mũikaseng'we nĩ ũndũ ũũ, nũndũ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla akw'ũ onthe makew'a wasya wake," 
John5:29 na mayuma mbũanĩ syoo. Ala mekaa meko maseo makathayũũka na kwĩkalaa thayũ, namo ala mekaa meko mathũku makathayũũka na kũsilĩlwa." 
John5:30 “Nyie vai ũndũ ndonya kwĩka na ũkũmũ wakwa mwene; nĩsilaa o ũndũ neew'a kuma kwa Asa, na kwoou ũsili wakwa nĩ wa w'o, nũndũ ndyendaa kwĩka kwenda kwakwa, ĩndĩ kwenda kwa ũla wandũmie." 
John5:31 “Ngeyumĩsya ũkũsĩ nyie mwene, ũkũsĩ wakwa ndũtonya kwĩthĩwa wa w'o." 
John5:32 Ĩndĩ ve ũmwe ũla ũngũsĩĩaa, na nĩnĩsĩ kana ũkũsĩ ũla wumasya ĩũlũ wakwa nĩ wa w'o." 
John5:33 Inyw'ĩ nĩmwatũmanie kũla kwĩ Yoana nake akũsĩĩa ũla w'o. 
John5:34 Ti atĩ nĩ na vata wa kumĩw'a ũkũsĩ nĩ andũ, ĩndĩ nĩneena maũndũ aa nĩ kana mũtonye kũtangĩĩwa." 
John5:35 Yoana aĩ ta taa wakene na kumya kyeni, nenyu nĩmweeyũmbanĩtye kũtanĩa kyeni kĩu kwa kavinda." 
John5:36 Ĩndĩ nyie nĩ na ũkũsĩ mũnene ĩũlũ wakwa kwĩ ũla wa Yoana, nũndũ mawĩa ala ngwĩka, namo nĩ mawĩa ala Asa wanengie nĩke, nĩmeũkũsĩĩa kana Asa nĩwe ũndũmĩte." 
John5:37 Asa ũla ũndũmĩte o nake nĩwumasya ũkũsĩ ĩũlũ wakwa. Inyw'ĩ mũyaaĩw'a wasya wake kana mũkona wũmbo wake," 
John5:38 o na ndeto syake iitwĩe nthĩnĩ wenyu, nũndũ mũiĩkĩĩaa ũla ũtũmĩtwe nĩwe." 
John5:39 Mũsomaa Maandĩko Matheu na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo, nũndũ mwonaa kana nthĩnĩ wamo nĩmũtonya ũkwata thayũ ũtathela. Ĩndĩ namo Maandĩko o asu makũsĩĩaa ĩũlũ wakwa," 
John5:40 nenyu mũyĩtĩkĩla kũka kwakwa mũkwate thayũ. 
John5:41 “Nyie ndiũmantha ndaĩa kuma kwa andũ. 
John5:42 Ĩndĩ nĩnĩsĩ kana ngoonĩ syenyu mũimwendete Ngai. 
John5:43 Nyie nũkĩte na ĩsyĩtwa ya Ĩthe wakwa, ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ nĩmũleete kũnthokya; mũndũ ũngĩ akoka na ĩsyĩtwa yake mwene, ũsu no mũmũthokye." 
John5:44 Mũkatonya ata ĩndĩ kũĩkĩĩa, inyw'ĩ andũ mũmanthaa ndaĩa kuma kwenyu ene, na mũimanthaa ndaĩa kuma kwa ũla nowe e weka Ngai." 
John5:45 Mũikasũanĩe kana nyie ngamũsikata kũla kwĩ Asa; Mwose ũla inyw'ĩ mwĩkwatasya nĩwe ũkamũsikata. 
John5:46 Kethĩwa kwa w'o nĩmwamũĩkĩĩie Mwose, no mũndĩkĩĩe o nakwa, nũndũ Mwose aandĩkaa ĩũlũ wakwa." 
John5:47 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũiĩkĩĩaa kĩla waandĩkie, mũkaĩkĩĩa ndeto syakwa ata?”" 
John6:1 Ĩtina wa ũu, Yesũ nĩwainganĩisye ngalĩko ĩla ĩngĩ ya Ĩia ya Kalilii, yĩla noyo yĩtawa Timbeliasi." 
John6:2 Ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ nĩyamumie ĩtina, nũndũ andũ asu nĩmoonete syama ila weekaa akavosya andũ ala maĩ awau." 
John6:3 Yesũ nĩwaendie kĩĩmanĩ ĩũlũ ekala nthĩ vo e na amanyĩw'a make. 
John6:4 Mboka ya Vasaka ya Ayuti yaĩ vakuvĩ. 
John6:5 Yĩla Yesũ wookĩlilye metho oona ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ yũkĩte vala ũĩ, nĩwakũlilye Vilivũ atĩĩ, “Tũtonya kũthooa mĩkate va andũ aa onthe makaya?”" 
John6:6 Amũkũlilye ũu aimũtata, nũndũ we mwene nĩweesĩ ũndũ ũkwĩsa kwĩka."
